verses.hebrewText: אָדָ֥ם שֵׁ֖ת אֱנֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: ADAM, SETH, Enosh;

jps.text: ADAM, SETH, Enosh;

verses.hebrewText: קֵינָ֥ן מַהֲלַלְאֵ֖ל יָֽרֶד׃
verses.englishText: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;

jps.text: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;

verses.hebrewText: חֲנֹ֥וךְ מְתוּשֶׁ֖לַח לָֽמֶךְ׃
verses.englishText: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;

jps.text: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֥חַ שֵׁ֖ם חָ֥ם וָיָֽפֶת׃ ס
verses.englishText: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

jps.text: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י יֶ֔פֶת גֹּ֣מֶר וּמָגֹ֔וג וּמָדַ֖י וְיָוָ֣ן וְתֻבָ֑ל וּמֶ֖שֶׁךְ וְתִירָֽס׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

jps.text: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י גֹּ֑מֶר אַשְׁכֲּנַ֥ז וְדִיפַ֖ת וְתֹוגַרְמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.

jps.text: And the sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י יָוָ֖ן אֱלִישָׁ֣ה וְתַרְשִׁ֑ישָׁה כִּתִּ֖ים וְרֹודָנִֽים׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Javan: Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.

jps.text: And the sons of Javan: Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י חָ֑ם כּ֥וּשׁ וּמִצְרַ֖יִם פּ֥וּט וּכְנָֽעַן׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Ham: Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

jps.text: The sons of Ham: Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י כ֔וּשׁ סְבָא֙ וַחֲוִילָ֔ה וְסַבְתָּ֥א וְרַעְמָ֖א וְסַבְתְּכָ֑א וּבְנֵ֥י רַעְמָ֖א שְׁבָ֥א וּדְדָֽן׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Cush: Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabteca. And the sons of Raama: Sheba, and Dedan.

jps.text: And the sons of Cush: Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabteca. And the sons of Raama: Sheba, and Dedan.

verses.hebrewText: וְכ֖וּשׁ יָלַ֣ד אֶת־נִמְרֹ֑וד ה֣וּא הֵחֵ֔ל לִהְיֹ֥ות גִּבֹּ֖ור בָּאָֽרֶץ׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Cush begot Nimrod; he began to be a mighty one in the earth.

jps.text: And Cush begot Nimrod; he began to be a mighty one in the earth.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִצְרַ֡יִם יָלַ֞ד אֶת־*לוּדִיִּים (לוּדִ֧ים) וְאֶת־עֲנָמִ֛ים וְאֶת־לְהָבִ֖ים וְאֶת־נַפְתֻּחִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And Mizraim begot Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

jps.text: And Mizraim begot Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

verses.hebrewText: וְֽאֶת־פַּתְרֻסִ֞ים וְאֶת־כַּסְלֻחִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָצְא֥וּ מִשָּׁ֛ם פְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וְאֶת־כַּפְתֹּרִֽים׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim — from whence came the Philistines — and Caphtorim.

jps.text: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim — from whence came the Philistines — and Caphtorim.

verses.hebrewText: וּכְנַ֗עַן יָלַ֛ד אֶת־צִידֹ֥ון בְּכֹרֹ֖ו וְאֶת־חֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: And Canaan begot Zidon his first-born, and Heth;

jps.text: And Canaan begot Zidon his first-born, and Heth;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־הַיְבוּסִי֙ וְאֶת־הָ֣אֱמֹרִ֔י וְאֵ֖ת הַגִּרְגָּשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;

jps.text: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־הַחִוִּ֥י וְאֶת־הֽ͏ַעַרְקִ֖י וְאֶת־הַסִּינִֽי׃
verses.englishText: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;

jps.text: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־הָאַרְוָדִ֥י וְאֶת־הַצְּמָרִ֖י וְאֶת־הֽ͏ַחֲמָתִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

jps.text: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י שֵׁ֔ם עֵילָ֣ם וְאַשּׁ֔וּר וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד וְל֣וּד וַאֲרָ֑ם וְע֥וּץ וְח֖וּל וְגֶ֥תֶר וָמֶֽשֶׁךְ׃ ס
verses.englishText: The Sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

jps.text: The Sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד יָלַ֣ד אֶת־שָׁ֑לַח וְשֶׁ֖לַח יָלַ֥ד אֶת־עֵֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: And Arpachshad begot Shelah, and Shelah begot Eber.

jps.text: And Arpachshad begot Shelah, and Shelah begot Eber.

verses.hebrewText: וּלְעֵ֥בֶר יֻלַּ֖ד שְׁנֵ֣י בָנִ֑ים שֵׁ֣ם הָאֶחָ֞ד פֶּ֗לֶג כִּ֤י בְיָמָיו֙ נִפְלְגָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ וְשֵׁ֥ם אָחִ֖יו יָקְטָֽן׃
verses.englishText: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; for in his days the earth was divided; and his brother's name was Joktan.

jps.text: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; for in his days the earth was divided; and his brother's name was Joktan.

verses.hebrewText: וְיָקְטָ֣ן יָלַ֔ד אֶת־אַלְמֹודָ֖ד וְאֶת־שָׁ֑לֶף וְאֶת־חֲצַרְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־יָֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: And Joktan begot Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;

jps.text: And Joktan begot Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־הֲדֹורָ֥ם וְאֶת־אוּזָ֖ל וְאֶת־דִּקְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;

jps.text: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־עֵיבָ֥ל וְאֶת־אֲבִימָאֵ֖ל וְאֶת־שְׁבָֽא׃
verses.englishText: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba;

jps.text: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־אֹופִ֥יר וְאֶת־חֲוִילָ֖ה וְאֶת־יֹובָ֑ב כָּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י יָקְטָֽן׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

jps.text: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

verses.englishText: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;

jps.text: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;

verses.hebrewText: עֵ֥בֶר פֶּ֖לֶג רְעֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: Eber, Peleg, Reu;

jps.text: Eber, Peleg, Reu;

verses.hebrewText: שְׂר֥וּג נָחֹ֖ור תָּֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: Serug, Nahor, Terah;

jps.text: Serug, Nahor, Terah;

verses.hebrewText: אַבְרָ֖ם ה֥וּא אַבְרָהָֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: Abram — the same is Abraham.

jps.text: Abram — the same is Abraham.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵי֙ אַבְרָהָ֔ם יִצְחָ֖ק וְיִשְׁמָעֵֽאל׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Abraham: Isaac, and Ishmael.

jps.text: The sons of Abraham: Isaac, and Ishmael.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֖לֶּה תֹּלְדֹותָ֑ם בְּכֹ֤ור יִשְׁמָעֵאל֙ נְבָיֹ֔ות וְקֵדָ֥ר וְאַדְבְּאֵ֖ל וּמִבְשָֽׂם׃
verses.englishText: These are their generations: the first-born of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

jps.text: These are their generations: the first-born of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

verses.hebrewText: מִשְׁמָ֣ע וְדוּמָ֔ה מַשָּׂ֖א חֲדַ֥ד וְתֵימָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,

jps.text: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,

verses.hebrewText: יְט֥וּר נָפִ֖ישׁ וָקֵ֑דְמָה אֵ֥לֶּה הֵ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׁמָעֵֽאל׃ ס
verses.englishText: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedem. These are the sons of Ishmael.

jps.text: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedem. These are the sons of Ishmael.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֨י קְטוּרָ֜ה פִּילֶ֣גֶשׁ אַבְרָהָ֗ם יָלְדָ֞ה אֶת־זִמְרָ֧ן וְיָקְשָׁ֛ן וּמְדָ֥ן וּמִדְיָ֖ן וְיִשְׁבָּ֣ק וְשׁ֑וּחַ וּבְנֵ֥י יָקְשָׁ֖ן שְׁבָ֥א וּדְדָֽן׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Keturah, Abraham's concubine: she bore Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan: Sheba, and Dedan.

jps.text: And the sons of Keturah, Abraham's concubine: she bore Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan: Sheba, and Dedan.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י מִדְיָ֗ן עֵיפָ֤ה וָעֵ֙פֶר֙ וַחֲנֹ֔וךְ וַאֲבִידָ֖ע וְאֶלְדָּעָ֑ה כָּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י קְטוּרָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Midian: Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.

jps.text: And the sons of Midian: Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֥ולֶד אַבְרָהָ֖ם אֶת־יִצְחָ֑ק ס בְּנֵ֣י יִצְחָ֔ק עֵשָׂ֖ו וְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau, and Israel.

jps.text: And Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau, and Israel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י עֵשָׂ֑ו אֱלִיפַ֛ז רְעוּאֵ֥ל וִיע֖וּשׁ וְיַעְלָ֥ם וְקֹֽרַח׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jalam and Korah.

jps.text: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jalam and Korah.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י אֱלִיפָ֑ז תֵּימָ֤ן וְאֹומָר֙ צְפִ֣י וְגַעְתָּ֔ם קְנַ֖ז וְתִמְנָ֥ע וַעֲמָלֵֽק׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

jps.text: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י רְעוּאֵ֑ל נַ֥חַת זֶ֖רַח שַׁמָּ֥ה וּמִזָּֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

jps.text: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י שֵׂעִ֔יר לֹוטָ֥ן וְשֹׁובָ֖ל וְצִבְעֹ֣ון וֽ͏ַעֲנָ֑ה וְדִישֹׁ֥ן וְאֵ֖צֶר וְדִישָֽׁן׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Seir: Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.

jps.text: And the sons of Seir: Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י לֹוטָ֖ן חֹרִ֣י וְהֹומָ֑ם וַאֲחֹ֥ות לֹוטָ֖ן תִּמְנָֽע׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Lotan: Hori, and Homam; and Timna was Lotan's sister.

jps.text: And the sons of Lotan: Hori, and Homam; and Timna was Lotan's sister.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י שֹׁובָ֔ל עַלְיָ֧ן וּמָנַ֛חַת וְעֵיבָ֖ל שְׁפִ֣י וְאֹונָ֑ם ס וּבְנֵ֥י צִבְעֹ֖ון אַיָּ֥ה וַעֲנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Shobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon: Aiah, and Anah.

jps.text: The sons of Shobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon: Aiah, and Anah.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֥י עֲנָ֖ה דִּישֹׁ֑ון ס וּבְנֵ֣י דִישֹׁ֔ון חַמְרָ֥ן וְאֶשְׁבָּ֖ן וְיִתְרָ֥ן וּכְרָֽן׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Anah: Dishon. And the sons of Dishon: Hamran, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

jps.text: The sons of Anah: Dishon. And the sons of Dishon: Hamran, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

verses.hebrewText: בְּֽנֵי־אֵ֔צֶר בִּלְהָ֥ן וְזַעֲוָ֖ן יַעֲקָ֑ן בְּנֵ֥י דִישֹׁ֖ון ע֥וּץ וַאֲרָֽן׃ פ
verses.englishText: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, and Zaavan, Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz, and Aran.

jps.text: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, and Zaavan, Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz, and Aran.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֣לֶּה הַמְּלָכִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר מָלְכוּ֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ אֱדֹ֔ום לִפְנֵ֥י מְלָךְ־מֶ֖לֶךְ לִבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בֶּ֚לַע בֶּן־בְּעֹ֔ור וְשֵׁ֥ם עִירֹ֖ו דִּנְהָֽבָה׃
verses.englishText: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before their reigned any king over the children of Israel: Bela the son of Beor; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

jps.text: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before their reigned any king over the children of Israel: Bela the son of Beor; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת בָּ֑לַע וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו יֹובָ֥ב בֶּן־זֶ֖רַח מִבָּצְרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

jps.text: And Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת יֹובָ֑ב וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו חוּשָׁ֖ם מֵאֶ֥רֶץ הַתֵּימָנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

jps.text: And Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת חוּשָׁ֑ם וַיִּמְלֹ֨ךְ תַּחְתָּ֜יו הֲדַ֣ד בֶּן־בְּדַ֗ד הַמַּכֶּ֤ה אֶת־מִדְיָן֙ בִּשְׂדֵ֣ה מֹואָ֔ב וְשֵׁ֥ם עִירֹ֖ו *עֲיֹות (עֲוִֽית)׃
verses.englishText: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Avith.

jps.text: And Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Avith.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת הֲדָ֑ד וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו שַׂמְלָ֖ה מִמַּשְׂרֵקָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

jps.text: And Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת שַׂמְלָ֑ה וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו שָׁא֖וּל מֵרְחֹבֹ֥ות הַנָּהָֽר׃
verses.englishText: And Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his stead.

jps.text: And Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת שָׁא֑וּל וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו בַּ֥עַל חָנָ֖ן בֶּן־עַכְבֹּֽור׃
verses.englishText: And Shaul died, and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

jps.text: And Shaul died, and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֙מָת֙ בַּ֣עַל חָנָ֔ן וַיִּמְלֹ֤ךְ תַּחְתָּיו֙ הֲדַ֔ד וְשֵׁ֥ם עִירֹ֖ו פָּ֑עִי וְשֵׁ֨ם אִשְׁתֹּ֤ו מְהֵיטַבְאֵל֙ בַּת־מַטְרֵ֔ד בַּ֖ת מֵ֥י זָהָֽב׃
verses.englishText: And Baal-hanan died, and Hadad reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife's name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

jps.text: And Baal-hanan died, and Hadad reigned in his stead; and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife's name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֖מָת הֲדָ֑ד ס וַיִּהְיוּ֙ אַלּוּפֵ֣י אֱדֹ֔ום אַלּ֥וּף תִּמְנָ֛ע אַלּ֥וּף *עַלְיָה (עַֽלְוָ֖ה) אַלּ֥וּף יְתֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: And Hadad died. And the chiefs of Edom were: the chief of Timna, the chief of Alvah, the chief of Jetheth;

jps.text: And Hadad died. And the chiefs of Edom were: the chief of Timna, the chief of Alvah, the chief of Jetheth;

verses.hebrewText: אַלּ֧וּף אָהֳלִיבָמָ֛ה אַלּ֥וּף אֵלָ֖ה אַלּ֥וּף פִּינֹֽן׃
verses.englishText: the chief of Oholibamah, the chief of Elah, the chief of Pinon;

jps.text: the chief of Oholibamah, the chief of Elah, the chief of Pinon;

verses.hebrewText: אַלּ֥וּף קְנַ֛ז אַלּ֥וּף תֵּימָ֖ן אַלּ֣וּף מִבְצָֽר׃
verses.englishText: the chief of Kenaz, the chief of Teman, the chief of Mibzar;

jps.text: the chief of Kenaz, the chief of Teman, the chief of Mibzar;

verses.hebrewText: אַלּ֥וּף מַגְדִּיאֵ֖ל אַלּ֣וּף עִירָ֑ם אֵ֖לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֥י אֱדֹֽום׃ פ
verses.englishText: the chief of Magdiel, the chief of Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom.

jps.text: the chief of Magdiel, the chief of Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רְאוּבֵ֤ן שִׁמְעֹון֙ לֵוִ֣י וִיהוּדָ֔ה יִשָׂשכָ֖ר וּזְבֻלֽוּן׃
verses.englishText: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun;

jps.text: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun;

verses.hebrewText: דָּ֚ן יֹוסֵ֣ף וּבִנְיָמִ֔ן נַפְתָּלִ֖י גָּ֥ד וְאָשֵֽׁר׃ ס
verses.englishText: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

jps.text: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֗ה עֵ֤ר וְאֹונָן֙ וְשֵׁלָ֔ה שְׁלֹושָׁה֙ נֹ֣ולַד לֹ֔ו מִבַּת־שׁ֖וּעַ הַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֑ית וַיְהִ֞י עֵ֣ר ׀ בְּכֹ֣ור יְהוּדָ֗ה רַ֛ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהוָ֖ה וַיְמִיתֵֽהוּ׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Judah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah; which three were born unto him of Bath-shua the Canaanitess. And Er, Judah's first-born, was wicked in the sight of the LORD; and He slew him.

jps.text: The sons of Judah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah; which three were born unto him of Bath-shua the Canaanitess. And Er, Judah's first-born, was wicked in the sight of the LORD; and He slew him.

verses.hebrewText: וְתָמָר֙ כַּלָּתֹ֔ו יָ֥לְדָה לֹּ֖ו אֶת־פֶּ֣רֶץ וְאֶת־זָ֑רַח כָּל־בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה חֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Tamar his daughter-in-law bore him Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

jps.text: And Tamar his daughter-in-law bore him Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵי־פֶ֖רֶץ חֶצְרֹ֥ון וְחָמֽוּל׃ ס
verses.englishText: The sons of Perez: Hezron, and Hamul.

jps.text: The sons of Perez: Hezron, and Hamul.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י זֶ֗רַח זִ֠מְרִי וְאֵיתָ֧ן וְהֵימָ֛ן וְכַלְכֹּ֥ל וָדָ֖רַע כֻּלָּ֥ם חֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Zerah: Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

jps.text: And the sons of Zerah: Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י כַּרְמִ֑י עָכָר֙ עֹוכֵ֣ר יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר מָעַ֖ל בַּחֵֽרֶם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who committed a trespass concerning the devoted thing.

jps.text: And the sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who committed a trespass concerning the devoted thing.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י אֵיתָ֖ן עֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ethan: Azariah.

jps.text: And the sons of Ethan: Azariah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י חֶצְרֹ֖ון אֲשֶׁ֣ר נֹולַד־לֹ֑ו אֶת־יְרַחְמְאֵ֥ל וְאֶת־רָ֖ם וְאֶת־כְּלוּבָֽי׃
verses.englishText: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him: Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

jps.text: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him: Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

verses.hebrewText: וְרָ֖ם הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־עַמִּינָדָ֑ב וְעַמִּינָדָב֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־נַחְשֹׁ֔ון נְשִׂ֖יא בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Ram begot Amminadab; and Amminadab begot Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

jps.text: And Ram begot Amminadab; and Amminadab begot Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

verses.hebrewText: וְנַחְשֹׁון֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שַׂלְמָ֔א וְשַׂלְמָ֖א הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־בֹּֽעַז׃
verses.englishText: and Nahshon begot Salma, and Salma begot Boaz;

jps.text: and Nahshon begot Salma, and Salma begot Boaz;

verses.hebrewText: וּבֹ֙עַז֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־עֹובֵ֔ד וְעֹובֵ֖ד הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־יִשָֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: and Boaz begot Obed, and Obed begot Jesse;

jps.text: and Boaz begot Obed, and Obed begot Jesse;

verses.hebrewText: וְאִישַׁ֛י הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־בְּכֹרֹ֖ו אֶת־אֱלִיאָ֑ב וַאֲבִינָדָב֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וְשִׁמְעָ֖א הַשְּׁלִישִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: and Jesse begot his first-born Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimea the third;

jps.text: and Jesse begot his first-born Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimea the third;

verses.hebrewText: נְתַנְאֵל֙ הָֽרְבִיעִ֔י רַדַּ֖י הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth;

jps.text: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth;

verses.hebrewText: אֹ֚צֶם הַשִּׁשִּׁ֔י דָּוִ֖יד הַשְּׁבִעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh.

jps.text: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh.

verses.hebrewText: *וְאַחְיֹתֵיהֶם (וְאַחְיֹותֵיהֶ֖ם) צְרוּיָ֣ה וַאֲבִיגָ֑יִל וּבְנֵ֣י צְרוּיָ֗ה אַבְשַׁ֛י וְיֹואָ֥ב וַעֲשָׂה־אֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

jps.text: And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲבִיגַ֕יִל יָלְדָ֖ה אֶת־עֲמָשָׂ֑א וַאֲבִ֣י עֲמָשָׂ֔א יֶ֖תֶר הַיִּשְׁמְעֵאלִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And Abigail bore Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.

jps.text: And Abigail bore Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.

verses.hebrewText: וְכָלֵ֣ב בֶּן־חֶצְרֹ֗ון הֹולִ֛יד אֶת־עֲזוּבָ֥ה אִשָּׁ֖ה וְאֶת־יְרִיעֹ֑ות וְאֵ֣לֶּה בָנֶ֔יהָ יֵ֥שֶׁר וְשֹׁובָ֖ב וְאַרְדֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: And Caleb the son of Hezron begot children of Azubah his wife — and of Jerioth — and these were her sons: Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

jps.text: And Caleb the son of Hezron begot children of Azubah his wife — and of Jerioth — and these were her sons: Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

verses.hebrewText: וַתָּ֖מָת עֲזוּבָ֑ה וַיִּֽקַּֽח־לֹ֤ו כָלֵב֙ אֶת־אֶפְרָ֔ת וַתֵּ֥לֶד לֹ֖ו אֶת־חֽוּר׃
verses.englishText: And Azubah died, and Caleb took unto him Ephrath, who bore him Hur.

jps.text: And Azubah died, and Caleb took unto him Ephrath, who bore him Hur.

verses.hebrewText: וְחוּר֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־אוּרִ֔י וְאוּרִ֖י הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־בְּצַלְאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Hur begot Uri, and Uri begot Bezalel.

jps.text: And Hur begot Uri, and Uri begot Bezalel.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַחַ֗ר בָּ֤א חֶצְרֹון֙ אֶל־בַּת־מָכִיר֙ אֲבִ֣י גִלְעָ֔ד וְה֣וּא לְקָחָ֔הּ וְה֖וּא בֶּן־שִׁשִּׁ֣ים שָׁנָ֑ה וַתֵּ֥לֶד לֹ֖ו אֶת־שְׂגֽוּב׃
verses.englishText: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead; whom he took to wife when he was threescore years old; and she bore him Segub.

jps.text: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead; whom he took to wife when he was threescore years old; and she bore him Segub.

verses.hebrewText: וּשְׂג֖וּב הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יָאִ֑יר וַֽיְהִי־לֹ֗ו עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וְשָׁלֹושׁ֙ עָרִ֔ים בְּאֶ֖רֶץ הַגִּלְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: And Segub begot Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.

jps.text: And Segub begot Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקַּ֣ח גְּשֽׁוּר־וַ֠אֲרָם אֶת־חַוֹּ֨ת יָאִ֧יר מֵאִתָּ֛ם אֶת־קְנָ֥ת וְאֶת־בְּנֹתֶ֖יהָ שִׁשִּׁ֣ים עִ֑יר כָּל־אֵ֕לֶּה בְּנֵ֖י מָכִ֥יר אֲבִי־גִלְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: And Geshur and Aram took Havvoth-jair from them, with Kenath, and the villages thereof, even threescore cities. All these were the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

jps.text: And Geshur and Aram took Havvoth-jair from them, with Kenath, and the villages thereof, even threescore cities. All these were the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַחַ֥ר מֹות־חֶצְרֹ֖ון בְּכָלֵ֣ב אֶפְרָ֑תָה וְאֵ֤שֶׁת חֶצְרֹון֙ אֲבִיָּ֔ה וַתֵּ֣לֶד לֹ֔ו אֶת־אַשְׁח֖וּר אֲבִ֥י תְקֹֽועַ׃
verses.englishText: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephrath, then Abiah Hezron's wife bore him Ashhur the father of Tekoa.

jps.text: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephrath, then Abiah Hezron's wife bore him Ashhur the father of Tekoa.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֧וּ בְנֵי־יְרַחְמְאֵ֛ל בְּכֹ֥ור חֶצְרֹ֖ון הַבְּכֹ֣ור ׀ רָ֑ם וּבוּנָ֥ה וָאֹ֛רֶן וָאֹ֖צֶם אֲחִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jerahmeel the first-born of Hezron were Ram the first-born, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, Ahijah.

jps.text: And the sons of Jerahmeel the first-born of Hezron were Ram the first-born, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, Ahijah.

verses.hebrewText: וַתְּהִ֨י אִשָּׁ֥ה אַחֶ֛רֶת לִֽירַחְמְאֵ֖ל וּשְׁמָ֣הּ עֲטָרָ֑ה הִ֖יא אֵ֥ם אֹונָֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.

jps.text: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵי־רָ֖ם בְּכֹ֣ור יְרַחְמְאֵ֑ל מַ֥עַץ וְיָמִ֖ין וָעֵֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ram the first-born of Jerahmeel were Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

jps.text: And the sons of Ram the first-born of Jerahmeel were Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בְנֵי־אֹונָ֖ם שַׁמַּ֣י וְיָדָ֑ע וּבְנֵ֣י שַׁמַּ֔י נָדָ֖ב וַאֲבִישֽׁוּר׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Onam were Shammai, and Jada; and the sons of Shammai: Nadab, and Abishur.

jps.text: And the sons of Onam were Shammai, and Jada; and the sons of Shammai: Nadab, and Abishur.

verses.hebrewText: וְשֵׁ֛ם אֵ֥שֶׁת אֲבִישׁ֖וּר אֲבִיהָ֑יִל וַתֵּ֣לֶד לֹ֔ו אֶת־אַחְבָּ֖ן וְאֶת־מֹולִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail; and she bore him Ahban, and Molid.

jps.text: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail; and she bore him Ahban, and Molid.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י נָדָ֖ב סֶ֣לֶד וְאַפָּ֑יִם וַיָּ֥מָת סֶ֖לֶד לֹ֥א בָנִֽים׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Nadab: Seled, and Appaim; but Seled died without children.

jps.text: And the sons of Nadab: Seled, and Appaim; but Seled died without children.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י אַפַּ֖יִם יִשְׁעִ֑י וּבְנֵ֤י יִשְׁעִי֙ שֵׁשָׁ֔ן וּבְנֵ֥י שֵׁשָׁ֖ן אַחְלָֽי׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Appaim: Ishi. And the sons of Ishi: Sheshan. And the sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.

jps.text: And the sons of Appaim: Ishi. And the sons of Ishi: Sheshan. And the sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֤י יָדָע֙ אֲחִ֣י שַׁמַּ֔י יֶ֖תֶר וְיֹונָתָ֑ן וַיָּ֥מָת יֶ֖תֶר לֹ֥א בָנִֽים׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai: Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.

jps.text: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai: Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י יֹונָתָ֖ן פֶּ֣לֶת וְזָזָ֑א אֵ֥לֶּה הָי֖וּ בְּנֵ֥י יְרַחְמְאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jonathan: Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

jps.text: And the sons of Jonathan: Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹֽא־הָיָ֧ה לְשֵׁשָׁ֛ן בָּנִ֖ים כִּ֣י אִם־בָּנֹ֑ות וּלְשֵׁשָׁ֛ן עֶ֥בֶד מִצְרִ֖י וּשְׁמֹ֥ו יַרְחָֽע׃
verses.englishText: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.

jps.text: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתֵּ֨ן שֵׁשָׁ֧ן אֶת־בִּתֹּ֛ו לְיַרְחָ֥ע עַבְדֹּ֖ו לְאִשָּׁ֑ה וַתֵּ֥לֶד לֹ֖ו אֶת־עַתָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: So Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bore him Attai.

jps.text: So Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bore him Attai.

verses.hebrewText: וְעַתַּי֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־נָתָ֔ן וְנָתָ֖ן הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־זָבָֽד׃
verses.englishText: And Attai begot Nathan, and Nathan begot Zabad;

jps.text: And Attai begot Nathan, and Nathan begot Zabad;

verses.hebrewText: וְזָבָד֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־אֶפְלָ֔ל וְאֶפְלָ֖ל הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־עֹובֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: and Zabad begot Ephlal, and Ephlal begot Obed;

jps.text: and Zabad begot Ephlal, and Ephlal begot Obed;

verses.hebrewText: וְעֹובֵד֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יֵה֔וּא וְיֵה֖וּא הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Obed begot Jehu, and Jehu begot Azariah;

jps.text: and Obed begot Jehu, and Jehu begot Azariah;

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲזַרְיָה֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־חָ֔לֶץ וְחֶ֖לֶץ הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֶלְעָשָֽׂה׃
verses.englishText: and Azariah begot Helez, and Helez begot Eleasah;

jps.text: and Azariah begot Helez, and Helez begot Eleasah;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶלְעָשָׂה֙ הֹלִ֣יד אֶת־סִֽסְמָ֔י וְסִסְמַ֖י הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: and Eleasah begot Sisamai, and Sisamai begot Shallum;

jps.text: and Eleasah begot Sisamai, and Sisamai begot Shallum;

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׁלּוּם֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יְקַמְיָ֔ה וִֽיקַמְיָ֖ה הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֱלִישָׁמָֽע׃
verses.englishText: and Shallum begot Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begot Elishama.

jps.text: and Shallum begot Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begot Elishama.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֤י כָלֵב֙ אֲחִ֣י יְרַחְמְאֵ֔ל מֵישָׁ֥ע בְּכֹרֹ֖ו ה֣וּא אֲבִי־זִ֑יף וּבְנֵ֥י מָרֵשָׁ֖ה אֲבִ֥י חֶבְרֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were Mesha his first-born, who was the father of Ziph, and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

jps.text: And the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were Mesha his first-born, who was the father of Ziph, and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י חֶבְרֹ֑ון קֹ֥רַח וְתַפֻּ֖חַ וְרֶ֥קֶם וָשָֽׁמַע׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Hebron: Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

jps.text: And the sons of Hebron: Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

verses.hebrewText: וְשֶׁ֣מַע הֹולִ֔יד אֶת־רַ֖חַם אֲבִ֣י יָרְקֳעָ֑ם וְרֶ֖קֶם הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁמָּֽי׃
verses.englishText: And Shema begot Raham, the father of Jorkeam; and Rekem begot Shammai.

jps.text: And Shema begot Raham, the father of Jorkeam; and Rekem begot Shammai.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־שַׁמַּ֖י מָעֹ֑ון וּמָעֹ֖ון אֲבִ֥י בֵֽית־צֽוּר׃
verses.englishText: And the son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.

jps.text: And the son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.

verses.hebrewText: וְעֵיפָה֙ פִּילֶ֣גֶשׁ כָּלֵ֔ב יָֽלְדָ֛ה אֶת־חָרָ֥ן וְאֶת־מֹוצָ֖א וְאֶת־גָּזֵ֑ז וְחָרָ֖ן הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־גָּזֵֽז׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Ephah, Caleb's concubine, bore Haran, and Moza, and Gazez; and Haran begot Gazez.

jps.text: And Ephah, Caleb's concubine, bore Haran, and Moza, and Gazez; and Haran begot Gazez.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י יָהְדָּ֑י רֶ֧גֶם וְיֹותָ֛ם וְגֵישָׁ֥ן וָפֶ֖לֶט וְעֵיפָ֥ה וָשָֽׁעַף׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jahdai: Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

jps.text: And the sons of Jahdai: Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

verses.hebrewText: פִּלֶ֤גֶשׁ כָּלֵב֙ מַעֲכָ֔ה יָ֥לַד שֶׁ֖בֶר וְאֶֽת־תִּרְחֲנָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Maacah, Caleb's concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.

jps.text: Maacah, Caleb's concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֵּ֗לֶד שַׁ֚עַף אֲבִ֣י מַדְמַנָּ֔ה אֶת־שְׁוָ֛א אֲבִ֥י מַכְבֵּנָ֖ה וַאֲבִ֣י גִבְעָ֑א וּבַת־כָּלֵ֖ב עַכְסָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the wife of Shaaph the father of Madmannah bore Sheva the father of Machbenah and the father of Gibea. And the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.

jps.text: And the wife of Shaaph the father of Madmannah bore Sheva the father of Machbenah and the father of Gibea. And the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֤לֶּה הָיוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י כָלֵ֔ב בֶּן־ח֖וּר בְּכֹ֣ור אֶפְרָ֑תָה שֹׁובָ֕ל אֲבִ֖י קִרְיַ֥ת יְעָרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: These were the sons of Caleb. The sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim;

jps.text: These were the sons of Caleb. The sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim;

verses.hebrewText: שַׂלְמָא֙ אֲבִ֣י בֵֽית־לָ֔חֶם חָרֵ֖ף אֲבִ֥י בֵית־גָּדֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.

jps.text: Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֤וּ בָנִים֙ לְשֹׁובָ֔ל אֲבִ֖י קִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֑ים הָרֹאֶ֖ה חֲצִ֥י הַמְּנֻחֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim had sons: Haroeh, and half of the Menuhoth.

jps.text: And Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim had sons: Haroeh, and half of the Menuhoth.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִשְׁפְּחֹות֙ קִרְיַ֣ת יְעָרִ֔ים הַיִּתְרִי֙ וְהַפּוּתִ֔י וְהַשֻּׁמָתִ֖י וְהַמִּשְׁרָעִ֑י מֵאֵ֗לֶּה יָצְאוּ֙ הַצָּ֣רְעָתִ֔י וְהָאֶשְׁתָּ֖אֻֽלִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zorathites, and the Eshtaolites.

jps.text: And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zorathites, and the Eshtaolites.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י שַׂלְמָ֗א בֵּ֥ית לֶ֙חֶם֙ וּנְטֹ֣ופָתִ֔י עַטְרֹ֖ות בֵּ֣ית יֹואָ֑ב וַחֲצִ֥י הַמָּנַחְתִּ֖י הַצָּרְעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Salma: Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.

jps.text: The sons of Salma: Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִשְׁפְּחֹ֤ות סֹפְרִים֙ *יֹשְׁבוּ (יֹשְׁבֵ֣י) יַעְבֵּ֔ץ תִּרְעָתִ֥ים שִׁמְעָתִ֖ים שׂוּכָתִ֑ים הֵ֚מָּה הַקִּינִ֣ים הַבָּאִ֔ים מֵחַמַּ֖ת אֲבִ֥י בֵית־רֵכָֽב׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the families of scribes that dwelt at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.

jps.text: And the families of scribes that dwelt at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֤לֶּה הָיוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י דָויִ֔ד אֲשֶׁ֥ר נֹֽולַד־לֹ֖ו בְּחֶבְרֹ֑ון הַבְּכֹ֣ור ׀ אַמְנֹ֗ן לַאֲחִינֹ֙עַם֙ הַיִּזְרְעֵאלִ֔ית שֵׁנִי֙ דָּנִיֵּ֔אל לַאֲבִיגַ֖יִל הַֽכַּרְמְלִֽית׃
verses.englishText: Now these were the sons of David, that were born unto him in Hebron: the first-born, Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second, Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess;

jps.text: Now these were the sons of David, that were born unto him in Hebron: the first-born, Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second, Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess;

verses.hebrewText: הַשְּׁלִשִׁי֙ לְאַבְשָׁלֹ֣ום בֶּֽן־מַעֲכָ֔ה בַּת־תַּלְמַ֖י מֶ֣לֶךְ גְּשׁ֑וּר הָרְבִיעִ֖י אֲדֹנִיָּ֥ה בֶן־חַגִּֽית׃
verses.englishText: the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith;

jps.text: the third, Absalom the son of Maacah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith;

verses.hebrewText: הַחֲמִישִׁ֥י שְׁפַטְיָ֖ה לַאֲבִיטָ֑ל הַשִּׁשִּׁ֥י יִתְרְעָ֖ם לְעֶגְלָ֥ה אִשְׁתֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: the fifth, Shephatiah of Abital; the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.

jps.text: the fifth, Shephatiah of Abital; the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.

verses.hebrewText: שִׁשָּׁה֙ נֹֽולַד־לֹ֣ו בְחֶבְרֹ֔ון וַיִּ֨מְלָךְ־שָׁ֔ם שֶׁ֥בַע שָׁנִ֖ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֣ה חֳדָשִׁ֑ים וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וְשָׁלֹושׁ֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ ס
verses.englishText: Six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months; and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.

jps.text: Six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months; and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֥לֶּה נוּלְּדוּ־לֹ֖ו בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑יִם שִׁ֠מְעָא וְשֹׁובָ֞ב וְנָתָ֤ן וּשְׁלֹמֹה֙ אַרְבָּעָ֔ה לְבַת־שׁ֖וּעַ בַּת־עַמִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem: Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel;

jps.text: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem: Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִבְחָ֥ר וֶאֱלִישָׁמָ֖ע וֶאֱלִיפָֽלֶט׃
verses.englishText: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet;

jps.text: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet;

verses.hebrewText: וְנֹ֥גַהּ וְנֶ֖פֶג וְיָפִֽיעַ׃
verses.englishText: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia;

jps.text: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia;

verses.hebrewText: וֶאֱלִישָׁמָ֧ע וְאֶלְיָדָ֛ע וֶאֱלִיפֶ֖לֶט תִּשְׁעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.

jps.text: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.

verses.hebrewText: כֹּ֖ל בְּנֵ֣י דָוִ֑יד מִלְּבַ֥ד בְּֽנֵי־פִֽילַגְשִׁ֖ים וְתָמָ֥ר אֲחֹותָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: All these were the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

jps.text: All these were the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה רְחַבְעָ֑ם אֲבִיָּ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו אָסָ֥א בְנֹ֖ו יְהֹושָׁפָ֥ט בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And Solomon's son was Rehoboam; Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son;

jps.text: And Solomon's son was Rehoboam; Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son;

verses.hebrewText: יֹורָ֥ם בְּנֹ֛ו אֲחַזְיָ֥הוּ בְנֹ֖ו יֹואָ֥שׁ בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son;

jps.text: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son;

verses.hebrewText: אֲמַצְיָ֧הוּ בְנֹ֛ו עֲזַרְיָ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו יֹותָ֥ם בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son;

jps.text: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son;

verses.hebrewText: אָחָ֥ז בְּנֹ֛ו חִזְקִיָּ֥הוּ בְנֹ֖ו מְנַשֶּׁ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son;

jps.text: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son;

verses.hebrewText: אָמֹ֥ון בְּנֹ֖ו יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

jps.text: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי֙ יֹאשִׁיָּ֔הוּ הַבְּכֹור֙ יֹוחָנָ֔ן הַשֵּׁנִ֖י יְהֹויָקִ֑ים הַשְּׁלִשִׁי֙ צִדְקִיָּ֔הוּ הָרְבִיעִ֖י שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Josiah: the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

jps.text: And the sons of Josiah: the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י יְהֹויָקִ֑ים יְכָנְיָ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו צִדְקִיָּ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

jps.text: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי֙ יְכָנְיָ֣ה אַסִּ֔ר שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵ֖ל בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jeconiah — the same is Assir — Shealtiel his son;

jps.text: And the sons of Jeconiah — the same is Assir — Shealtiel his son;

verses.hebrewText: וּמַלְכִּירָ֥ם וּפְדָיָ֖ה וְשֶׁנְאַצַּ֑ר יְקַמְיָ֥ה הֹושָׁמָ֖ע וּנְדַבְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Malchiram, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

jps.text: and Malchiram, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י פְדָיָ֔ה זְרֻבָּבֶ֖ל וְשִׁמְעִ֑י וּבֶן־זְרֻבָּבֶל֙ מְשֻׁלָּ֣ם וַחֲנַנְיָ֔ה וּשְׁלֹמִ֖ית אֲחֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel, and Shimei. And the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam, and Hananiah; and Shelomith was their sister;

jps.text: And the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel, and Shimei. And the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam, and Hananiah; and Shelomith was their sister;

verses.hebrewText: וַחֲשֻׁבָ֡ה וָ֠אֹהֶל וּבֶרֶכְיָ֧ה וֽ͏ַחֲסַדְיָ֛ה י֥וּשַׁב חֶ֖סֶד חָמֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: and Hashubah and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushabhesed, five.

jps.text: and Hashubah and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushabhesed, five.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־חֲנַנְיָ֖ה פְּלַטְיָ֣ה וִישַֽׁעְיָ֑ה בְּנֵ֤י רְפָיָה֙ בְּנֵ֣י אַרְנָ֔ן בְּנֵ֥י עֹבַדְיָ֖ה בְּנֵ֥י שְׁכַנְיָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah, and Jeshaiah; the sons of Jeshaiah: Rephaiah; the sons of Rephaiah: Arnan; the sons of Arnan: Obadiah; the sons of Obadiah: Shecaniah.

jps.text: And the sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah, and Jeshaiah; the sons of Jeshaiah: Rephaiah; the sons of Rephaiah: Arnan; the sons of Arnan: Obadiah; the sons of Obadiah: Shecaniah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י שְׁכַנְיָ֖ה שְׁמַעְיָ֑ה וּבְנֵ֣י שְׁמַעְיָ֗ה חַטּ֡וּשׁ וְ֠יִגְאָל וּבָרִ֧יחַ וּנְעַרְיָ֛ה וְשָׁפָ֖ט שִׁשָּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Shecaniah: Shemaiah; and the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

jps.text: And the sons of Shecaniah: Shemaiah; and the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־נְעַרְיָ֗ה אֶלְיֹועֵינַ֧י וְחִזְקִיָּ֛ה וְעַזְרִיקָ֖ם שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Neariah: Elioenai, and Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.

jps.text: And the sons of Neariah: Elioenai, and Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י אֶלְיֹועֵינַ֗י *הֹדַיְוָהוּ (הֹודַוְיָ֡הוּ) וְאֶלְיָשִׁ֡יב וּפְלָיָ֡ה וְ֠עַקּוּב וְיֹוחָנָ֧ן וּדְלָיָ֛ה וַעֲנָ֖נִי שִׁבְעָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani, seven.

jps.text: And the sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani, seven.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י יְהוּדָ֑ה פֶּ֧רֶץ חֶצְרֹ֛ון וְכַרְמִ֖י וְח֥וּר וְשֹׁובָֽל׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

jps.text: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

verses.hebrewText: וּרְאָיָ֤ה בֶן־שֹׁובָל֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יַ֔חַת וְיַ֣חַת הֹלִ֔יד אֶת־אֲחוּמַ֖י וְאֶת־לָ֑הַד אֵ֖לֶּה מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ות הַצָּֽרְעָתִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begot Jahath; and Jahath begot Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.

jps.text: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begot Jahath; and Jahath begot Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ אֲבִ֣י עֵיטָ֔ם יִזְרְעֶ֥אל וְיִשְׁמָ֖א וְיִדְבָּ֑שׁ וְשֵׁ֥ם אֲחֹותָ֖ם הַצְלֶלְפֹּֽונִי׃
verses.englishText: And these were the sons of the father of Etam: Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazlelponi;

jps.text: And these were the sons of the father of Etam: Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazlelponi;

verses.hebrewText: וּפְנוּאֵל֙ אֲבִ֣י גְדֹ֔ר וְעֵ֖זֶר אֲבִ֣י חוּשָׁ֑ה אֵ֤לֶּה בְנֵי־חוּר֙ בְּכֹ֣ור אֶפְרָ֔תָה אֲבִ֖י בֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath, the father of Beth-lehem.

jps.text: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur the first-born of Ephrath, the father of Beth-lehem.

verses.hebrewText: וּלְאַשְׁחוּר֙ אֲבִ֣י תְקֹ֔ועַ הָי֖וּ שְׁתֵּ֣י נָשִׁ֑ים חֶלְאָ֖ה וְנַעֲרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

jps.text: And Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֵּ֨לֶד לֹ֤ו נַעֲרָה֙ אֶת־אֲחֻזָּ֣ם וְאֶת־חֵ֔פֶר וְאֶת־תֵּימְנִ֖י וְאֶת־הָאֲחַשְׁתָּרִ֑י אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י נַעֲרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Naarah bore him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Timeni, and Ahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.

jps.text: And Naarah bore him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Timeni, and Ahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י חֶלְאָ֑ה צֶ֥רֶת *יִצְחָר (וְצֹ֖חַר) וְאֶתְנָֽן׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Helah were Zereth, and Zohar, and Ethnan.

jps.text: And the sons of Helah were Zereth, and Zohar, and Ethnan.

verses.hebrewText: וְקֹ֣וץ הֹולִ֔יד אֶת־עָנ֖וּב וְאֶת־הַצֹּבֵבָ֑ה וּמִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ות אֲחַרְחֵ֖ל בֶּן־הָרֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: And Koz begot Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

jps.text: And Koz begot Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִ֣י יַעְבֵּ֔ץ נִכְבָּ֖ד מֵאֶחָ֑יו וְאִמֹּ֗ו קָרְאָ֨ה שְׁמֹ֤ו יַעְבֵּץ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר כִּ֥י יָלַ֖דְתִּי בְּעֹֽצֶב׃
verses.englishText: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying: 'Because I bore him with pain.'

jps.text: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying: 'Because I bore him with pain.'

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקְרָ֣א יַ֠עְבֵּץ לֵאלֹהֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל לֵאמֹ֗ר אִם־בָּרֵ֨ךְ תְּבָרֲכֵ֜נִי וְהִרְבִּ֤יתָ אֶת־גְּבוּלִי֙ וְהָיְתָ֤ה יָדְךָ֙ עִמִּ֔י וְעָשִׂ֥יתָ מֵּרָעָ֖ה לְבִלְתִּ֣י עָצְבִּ֑י וַיָּבֵ֥א אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֵ֥ת אֲשֶׁר־שָׁאָֽל׃
verses.englishText: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying: 'Oh that Thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my border, and that Thy hand might be with me, and that Thou wouldest work deliverance from evil, that it may not pain me!' And God granted him that which he requested.

jps.text: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying: 'Oh that Thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my border, and that Thy hand might be with me, and that Thou wouldest work deliverance from evil, that it may not pain me!' And God granted him that which he requested.

verses.hebrewText: וּכְל֥וּב אֲחִֽי־שׁוּחָ֖ה הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־מְחִ֑יר ה֖וּא אֲבִ֥י אֶשְׁתֹּֽון׃
verses.englishText: And Chelub the brother of Shuhah begot Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

jps.text: And Chelub the brother of Shuhah begot Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶשְׁתֹּ֗ון הֹולִ֞יד אֶת־בֵּ֤ית רָפָא֙ וְאֶת־פָּסֵ֔חַ וְאֶת־תְּחִנָּ֖ה אֲבִ֣י עִ֣יר נָחָ֑שׁ אֵ֖לֶּה אַנְשֵׁ֥י רֵכָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Eshton begot Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.

jps.text: And Eshton begot Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י קְנַ֔ז עָתְנִיאֵ֖ל וּשְׂרָיָ֑ה וּבְנֵ֥י עָתְנִיאֵ֖ל חֲתַֽת׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Kenaz: Othniel, and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath.

jps.text: And the sons of Kenaz: Othniel, and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath.

verses.hebrewText: וּמְעֹונֹתַ֖י הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־עָפְרָ֑ה וּשְׂרָיָ֗ה הֹולִ֤יד אֶת־יֹואָב֙ אֲבִי֙ גֵּ֣יא חֲרָשִׁ֔ים כִּ֥י חֲרָשִׁ֖ים הָיֽוּ׃ פ
verses.englishText: And Meonothai begot Ophrah; and Seraiah begot Joab the father of Ge-harashim; for they were craftsmen.

jps.text: And Meonothai begot Ophrah; and Seraiah begot Joab the father of Ge-harashim; for they were craftsmen.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי֙ כָּלֵ֣ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּ֔ה עִ֥ירוּ אֵלָ֖ה וָנָ֑עַם וּבְנֵ֥י אֵלָ֖ה וּקְנַֽז׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the sons of Elah: Kenaz.

jps.text: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the sons of Elah: Kenaz.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י יְהַלֶּלְאֵ֑ל זִ֣יף וְזִיפָ֔ה תִּירְיָ֖א וַאֲשַׂרְאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.

jps.text: And the sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־עֶזְרָ֔ה יֶ֥תֶר וּמֶ֖רֶד וְעֵ֣פֶר וְיָלֹ֑ון וַתַּ֙הַר֙ אֶת־מִרְיָ֣ם וְאֶת־שַׁמַּ֔י וְאֶת־יִשְׁבָּ֖ח אֲבִ֥י אֶשְׁתְּמֹֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ezrah: Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon. And she bore Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa —

jps.text: And the sons of Ezrah: Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon. And she bore Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa —

verses.hebrewText: וְאִשְׁתֹּ֣ו הַיְהֻדִיָּ֗ה יָלְדָ֞ה אֶת־יֶ֨רֶד אֲבִ֤י גְדֹור֙ וְאֶת־חֶ֙בֶר֙ אֲבִ֣י שֹׂוכֹ֔ו וְאֶת־יְקֽוּתִיאֵ֖ל אֲבִ֣י זָנֹ֑וחַ וְאֵ֗לֶּה בְּנֵי֙ בִּתְיָ֣ה בַת־פַּרְעֹ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר לָקַ֖ח מָֽרֶד׃ ס
verses.englishText: and his wife Hajehudijah bore Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah — and these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh whom Mered took.

jps.text: and his wife Hajehudijah bore Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah — and these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh whom Mered took.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי֙ אֵ֣שֶׁת הֹֽודִיָּ֔ה אֲחֹ֣ות נַ֔חַם אֲבִ֥י קְעִילָ֖ה הַגַּרְמִ֑י וְאֶשְׁתְּמֹ֖עַ הַמַּעֲכָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

jps.text: And the sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י שִׁימֹ֔ון אַמְנֹ֣ון וְרִנָּ֔ה בֶּן־חָנָ֖ן *וְתֹולֹון (וְתִילֹ֑ון) וּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׁעִ֔י זֹוחֵ֖ת וּבֶן־זֹוחֵֽת׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Shimon: Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi: Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.

jps.text: And the sons of Shimon: Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi: Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵי֙ שֵׁלָ֣ה בֶן־יְהוּדָ֔ה עֵ֚ר אֲבִ֣י לֵכָ֔ה וְלַעְדָּ֖ה אֲבִ֣י מָרֵשָׁ֑ה וּמִשְׁפְּחֹ֛ות בֵּית־עֲבֹדַ֥ת הַבֻּ֖ץ לְבֵ֥ית אַשְׁבֵּֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lecah, and Ladah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;

jps.text: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lecah, and Ladah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹוקִ֞ים וְאַנְשֵׁ֣י כֹזֵבָ֗א וְיֹואָ֧שׁ וְשָׂרָ֛ף אֲשֶׁר־בָּעֲל֥וּ לְמֹואָ֖ב וְיָשֻׁ֣בִי לָ֑חֶם וְהַדְּבָרִ֖ים עַתִּיקִֽים׃
verses.englishText: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And the records are ancient.

jps.text: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And the records are ancient.

verses.hebrewText: הֵ֚מָּה הַיֹּ֣וצְרִ֔ים וְיֹשְׁבֵ֥י נְטָעִ֖ים וּגְדֵרָ֑ה עִם־הַמֶּ֥לֶךְ בִּמְלַאכְתֹּ֖ו יָ֥שְׁבוּ שָֽׁם׃ ס
verses.englishText: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plantations and hedges; there they dwelt occupied in the king's work.

jps.text: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plantations and hedges; there they dwelt occupied in the king's work.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י שִׁמְעֹ֑ון נְמוּאֵ֣ל וְיָמִ֔ין יָרִ֖יב זֶ֥רַח שָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, and Jamim, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;

jps.text: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, and Jamim, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;

verses.hebrewText: שַׁלֻּ֥ם בְּנֹ֛ו מִבְשָׂ֥ם בְּנֹ֖ו מִשְׁמָ֥ע בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.

jps.text: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י מִשְׁמָ֑ע חַמּוּאֵ֥ל בְּנֹ֛ו זַכּ֥וּר בְּנֹ֖ו שִׁמְעִ֥י בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.

jps.text: And the sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּלְשִׁמְעִ֞י בָּנִ֨ים שִׁשָּׁ֤ה עָשָׂר֙ וּבָנֹ֣ות שֵׁ֔שׁ וּלְאֶחָ֕יו אֵ֖ין בָּנִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וְכֹל֙ מִשְׁפַּחְתָּ֔ם לֹ֥א הִרְבּ֖וּ עַד־בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.

jps.text: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּֽשְׁב֛וּ בִּבְאֵֽר־שֶׁ֥בַע וּמֹולָדָ֖ה וַחֲצַ֥ר שׁוּעָֽל׃
verses.englishText: And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual;

jps.text: And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual;

verses.hebrewText: וּבְבִלְהָ֥ה וּבְעֶ֖צֶם וּבְתֹולָֽד׃
verses.englishText: and at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad;

jps.text: and at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad;

verses.hebrewText: וּבִבְתוּאֵ֥ל וּבְחָרְמָ֖ה וּבְצִֽיקְלָֽג׃
verses.englishText: and at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag;

jps.text: and at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag;

verses.hebrewText: וּבְבֵ֤ית מַרְכָּבֹות֙ וּבַחֲצַ֣ר סוּסִ֔ים וּבְבֵ֥ית בִּרְאִ֖י וּֽבְשַׁעֲרָ֑יִם אֵ֥לֶּה עָרֵיהֶ֖ם עַד־מְלֹ֥ךְ דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: and at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-biri, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.

jps.text: and at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-biri, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.

verses.hebrewText: וְחַצְרֵיהֶם֙ עֵיטָ֣ם וָעַ֔יִן רִמֹּ֥ון וְתֹ֖כֶן וְעָשָׁ֑ן עָרִ֖ים חָמֵֽשׁ׃
verses.englishText: And their villages were Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities;

jps.text: And their villages were Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities;

verses.hebrewText: וְכָל־חַצְרֵיהֶ֗ם אֲשֶׁ֧ר סְבִיבֹ֛ות הֶעָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה עַד־בָּ֑עַל זֹ֚את מֹושְׁבֹתָ֔ם וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֖ם לָהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: and all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and they have their genealogy.

jps.text: and all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and they have their genealogy.

verses.hebrewText: וּמְשֹׁובָ֣ב וְיַמְלֵ֔ךְ וְיֹושָׁ֖ה בֶּן־אֲמַצְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah;

jps.text: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah;

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹואֵ֑ל וְיֵהוּא֙ בֶּן־יֹ֣ושִׁבְיָ֔ה בֶּן־שְׂרָיָ֖ה בֶּן־עֲשִׂיאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: and Joel, and Jehu the son of Joshibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel;

jps.text: and Joel, and Jehu the son of Joshibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶלְיֹועֵינַ֡י וְֽיַעֲקֹ֡בָה וִ֠ישֹׁוחָיָה וַעֲשָׂיָ֧ה וַעֲדִיאֵ֛ל וִישִׂימִאֵ֖ל וּבְנָיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshoaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah;

jps.text: and Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshoaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah;

verses.hebrewText: וְזִיזָ֨א בֶן־שִׁפְעִ֧י בֶן־אַלֹּ֛ון בֶּן־יְדָיָ֥ה בֶן־שִׁמְרִ֖י בֶּן־שְׁמַֽעְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;

jps.text: and Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֚לֶּה הַבָּאִ֣ים בְּשֵׁמֹ֔ות נְשִׂיאִ֖ים בְּמִשְׁפְּחֹותָ֑ם וּבֵית֙ אֲבֹ֣ותֵיהֶ֔ם פָּרְצ֖וּ לָרֹֽוב׃
verses.englishText: these mentioned by name were princes in their families; and their fathers' houses increased greatly.

jps.text: these mentioned by name were princes in their families; and their fathers' houses increased greatly.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּלְכוּ֙ לִמְבֹ֣וא גְדֹ֔ר עַ֖ד לְמִזְרַ֣ח הַגָּ֑יְא לְבַקֵּ֥שׁ מִרְעֶ֖ה לְצֹאנָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

jps.text: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּמְצְא֤וּ מִרְעֶה֙ שָׁמֵ֣ן וָטֹ֔וב וְהָאָ֙רֶץ֙ רַחֲבַ֣ת יָדַ֔יִם וְשֹׁקֶ֖טֶת וּשְׁלֵוָ֑ה כִּ֣י מִן־חָ֔ם הַיֹּשְׁבִ֥ים שָׁ֖ם לְפָנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they that dwelt there aforetime were of Ham.

jps.text: And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they that dwelt there aforetime were of Ham.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּבֹ֡אוּ אֵלֶּה֩ הַכְּתוּבִ֨ים בְּשֵׁמֹ֜ות בִּימֵ֣י ׀ יְחִזְקִיָּ֣הוּ מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֗ה וַיַּכּ֨וּ אֶת־אָהֳלֵיהֶ֜ם וְאֶת־*הַמְּעִינִים (הַמְּעוּנִ֨ים) אֲשֶׁ֤ר נִמְצְאוּ־שָׁ֙מָּה֙ וַיַּחֲרִימֻם֙ עַד־הַיֹּ֣ום הַזֶּ֔ה וַיֵּשְׁב֖וּ תַּחְתֵּיהֶ֑ם כִּֽי־מִרְעֶ֥ה לְצֹאנָ֖ם שָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the Meunim that were found there, and destroyed them utterly, unto this day, and dwelt in their stead; because there was pasture there for their flocks.

jps.text: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the Meunim that were found there, and destroyed them utterly, unto this day, and dwelt in their stead; because there was pasture there for their flocks.

verses.hebrewText: וּמֵהֶ֣ם ׀ מִן־בְּנֵ֣י שִׁמְעֹ֗ון הָלְכוּ֙ לְהַ֣ר שֵׂעִ֔יר אֲנָשִׁ֖ים חֲמֵ֣שׁ מֵאֹ֑ות וּפְלַטְיָ֡ה וּ֠נְעַרְיָה וּרְפָיָ֧ה וְעֻזִּיאֵ֛ל בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׁעִ֖י בְּרֹאשָֽׁם׃
verses.englishText: And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

jps.text: And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּכּ֕וּ אֶת־שְׁאֵרִ֥ית הַפְּלֵטָ֖ה לַעֲמָלֵ֑ק וַיֵּ֣שְׁבוּ שָׁ֔ם עַ֖ד הַיֹּ֥ום הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.englishText: And they smote the remnant of the Amalekites that escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.

jps.text: And they smote the remnant of the Amalekites that escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֨י רְאוּבֵ֥ן בְּכֹֽור־יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ כִּ֣י ה֣וּא הַבְּכֹור֒ וּֽבְחַלְּלֹו֙ יְצוּעֵ֣י אָבִ֔יו נִתְּנָה֙ בְּכֹ֣רָתֹ֔ו לִבְנֵ֥י יֹוסֵ֖ף בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלֹ֥א לְהִתְיַחֵ֖שׂ לַבְּכֹרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel — for he was the first-born; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father's couch, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel, yet not so that he was to be reckoned in the genealogy as first-born.

jps.text: And the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel — for he was the first-born; but, forasmuch as he defiled his father's couch, his birthright was given unto the sons of Joseph the son of Israel, yet not so that he was to be reckoned in the genealogy as first-born.

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֤י יְהוּדָה֙ גָּבַ֣ר בְּאֶחָ֔יו וּלְנָגִ֖יד מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וְהַבְּכֹרָ֖ה לְיֹוסֵֽף׃ ס
verses.englishText: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him came he that is the prince; but the birthright was Joseph's —

jps.text: For Judah prevailed above his brethren, and of him came he that is the prince; but the birthright was Joseph's —

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֥י רְאוּבֵ֖ן בְּכֹ֣ור יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל חֲנֹ֥וךְ וּפַלּ֖וּא חֶצְרֹ֥ון וְכַרְמִֽי׃
verses.englishText: the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel: Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

jps.text: the sons of Reuben the first-born of Israel: Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י יֹואֵ֑ל שְׁמַֽעְיָ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו גֹּ֥וג בְּנֹ֖ו שִׁמְעִ֥י בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son;

jps.text: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son;

verses.hebrewText: מִיכָ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו רְאָיָ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו בַּ֥עַל בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son;

jps.text: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son;

verses.hebrewText: בְּאֵרָ֣ה בְנֹ֔ו אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֶגְלָ֔ה תִּלְּגַ֥ת פִּלְנְאֶ֖סֶר מֶ֣לֶךְ אַשֻּׁ֑ר ה֥וּא נָשִׂ֖יא לָרֽאוּבֵנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Beerah his son, whom Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive; he was prince of the Reubenites.

jps.text: Beerah his son, whom Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive; he was prince of the Reubenites.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶחָיו֙ לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֔יו בְּהִתְיַחֵ֖שׂ לְתֹלְדֹותָ֑ם הָרֹ֥אשׁ יְעִיאֵ֖ל וּזְכַרְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.englishText: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned: the chief Jeiel, and Zechariah,

jps.text: And his brethren by their families, when the genealogy of their generations was reckoned: the chief Jeiel, and Zechariah,

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶ֙לַע֙ בֶּן־עָזָ֔ז בֶּן־שֶׁ֖מַע בֶּן־יֹואֵ֑ל ה֚וּא יֹושֵׁ֣ב בַּעֲרֹעֵ֔ר וְעַד־נְבֹ֖ו וּבַ֥עַל מְעֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: and Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baal-meon;

jps.text: and Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, even unto Nebo and Baal-meon;

verses.hebrewText: וְלַמִּזְרָ֗ח יָשַׁב֙ עַד־לְבֹ֣וא מִדְבָּ֔רָה לְמִן־הַנָּהָ֖ר פְּרָ֑ת כִּ֧י מִקְנֵיהֶ֛ם רָב֖וּ בְּאֶ֥רֶץ גִּלְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: and eastward he dwelt even unto the entrance of the wilderness from the river Euphrates; because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.

jps.text: and eastward he dwelt even unto the entrance of the wilderness from the river Euphrates; because their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.

verses.hebrewText: וּבִימֵ֣י שָׁא֗וּל עָשׂ֤וּ מִלְחָמָה֙ עִם־הַֽהַגְרִאִ֔ים וַֽיִּפְּל֖וּ בְּיָדָ֑ם וַיֵּשְׁבוּ֙ בְּאָ֣הֳלֵיהֶ֔ם עַֽל־כָּל־פְּנֵ֖י מִזְרָ֥ח לַגִּלְעָֽד׃ פ
verses.englishText: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagrites, who fell by their hand; and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the land east of Gilead.

jps.text: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagrites, who fell by their hand; and they dwelt in their tents throughout all the land east of Gilead.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי־גָ֣ד לְנֶגְדָּ֗ם יָֽשְׁב֛וּ בְּאֶ֥רֶץ הַבָּשָׁ֖ן עַד־סַלְכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salcah:

jps.text: And the sons of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan unto Salcah:

verses.hebrewText: יֹואֵ֣ל הָרֹ֔אשׁ וְשָׁפָ֖ם הַמִּשְׁנֶ֑ה וְיַעְנַ֥י וְשָׁפָ֖ט בַּבָּשָֽׁן׃
verses.englishText: Joel the chief, and Shapham the second, and Janai, and Shaphat in Bashan;

jps.text: Joel the chief, and Shapham the second, and Janai, and Shaphat in Bashan;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֞ם לְבֵ֣ית אֲבֹותֵיהֶ֗ם מִֽיכָאֵ֡ל וּמְשֻׁלָּ֡ם וְ֠שֶׁבַע וְיֹורַ֧י וְיַעְכָּ֛ן וְזִ֥יעַ וָעֵ֖בֶר שִׁבְעָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: and their brethren of their fathers' houses: Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jacan, and Zia, and Eber, seven.

jps.text: and their brethren of their fathers' houses: Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jacan, and Zia, and Eber, seven.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣לֶּה ׀ בְּנֵ֣י אֲבִיחַ֗יִל בֶּן־חוּרִ֡י בֶּן־יָ֠רֹוחַ בֶּן־גִּלְעָ֧ד בֶּן־מִיכָאֵ֛ל בֶּן־יְשִׁישַׁ֥י בֶּן־יַחְדֹּ֖ו בֶּן־בּֽוּז׃
verses.englishText: These were the sons of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jehishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;

jps.text: These were the sons of Abihail the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jehishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz;

verses.hebrewText: אֲחִי֙ בֶּן־עַבְדִּיאֵ֣ל בֶּן־גּוּנִ֔י רֹ֖אשׁ לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of their fathers' houses.

jps.text: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, chief of their fathers' houses.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּֽשְׁב֛וּ בַּגִּלְעָ֥ד בַּבָּשָׁ֖ן וּבִבְנֹתֶ֑יהָ וּבְכָֽל־מִגְרְשֵׁ֥י שָׁרֹ֖ון עַל־תֹּוצְאֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in the towns thereof, and in all the open lands of the plain, upon their borders.

jps.text: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in the towns thereof, and in all the open lands of the plain, upon their borders.

verses.hebrewText: כֻּלָּם֙ הִתְיַחְשׂ֔וּ בִּימֵ֖י יֹותָ֣ם מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֑ה וּבִימֵ֖י יָרָבְעָ֥ם מֶֽלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

jps.text: All these were reckoned by genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵֽי־רְאוּבֵ֨ן וְגָדִ֜י וַחֲצִ֥י שֵֽׁבֶט־מְנַשֶּׁה֮ מִן־בְּנֵי־חַיִל֒ אֲ֠נָשִׁים נֹשְׂאֵ֨י מָגֵ֤ן וְחֶ֙רֶב֙ וְדֹ֣רְכֵי קֶ֔שֶׁת וּלְמוּדֵ֖י מִלְחָמָ֑ה אַרְבָּעִ֨ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֥ה אֶ֛לֶף וּשְׁבַע־מֵאֹ֥ות וְשִׁשִּׁ֖ים יֹצְאֵ֥י צָבָֽא׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, as many as were valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, were forty and four thousand seven hundred and threescore, that were able to go forth to war.

jps.text: The sons of Reuben, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, as many as were valiant men, men able to bear buckler and sword, and to shoot with bow, and skilful in war, were forty and four thousand seven hundred and threescore, that were able to go forth to war.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּעֲשׂ֥וּ מִלְחָמָ֖ה עִם־הַֽהַגְרִיאִ֑ים וִיט֥וּר וְנָפִ֖ישׁ וְנֹודָֽב׃
verses.englishText: And they made war with the Hagrites, with Jetur, and Naphish, and Nodab.

jps.text: And they made war with the Hagrites, with Jetur, and Naphish, and Nodab.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּעָזְר֣וּ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וַיִּנָּתְנ֤וּ בְיָדָם֙ הַֽהַגְרִיאִ֔ים וְכֹ֖ל שֶׁ֣עִמָּהֶ֑ם כִּ֠י לֵאלֹהִ֤ים זָעֲקוּ֙ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וְנַעְתֹּ֥ור לָהֶ֖ם כִּי־בָ֥טְחוּ בֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And they were helped against them, and the Hagrites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them; for they cried to God in the battle, and He was entreated of them, because they put their trust in Him.

jps.text: And they were helped against them, and the Hagrites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them; for they cried to God in the battle, and He was entreated of them, because they put their trust in Him.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּשְׁבּ֣וּ מִקְנֵיהֶ֗ם גְּֽמַלֵּיהֶ֞ם חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים אֶ֙לֶף֙ וְצֹ֗אן מָאתַ֤יִם וַחֲמִשִּׁים֙ אֶ֔לֶף וַחֲמֹורִ֖ים אַלְפָּ֑יִם וְנֶ֥פֶשׁ אָדָ֖ם מֵ֥אָה אָֽלֶף׃
verses.englishText: And they took away their cattle: of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand; and of souls of men a hundred thousand.

jps.text: And they took away their cattle: of their camels fifty thousand, and of sheep two hundred and fifty thousand, and of asses two thousand; and of souls of men a hundred thousand.

verses.hebrewText: כִּֽי־חֲלָלִ֤ים רַבִּים֙ נָפָ֔לוּ כִּ֥י מֵהָאֱלֹהִ֖ים הַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה וַיֵּשְׁב֥וּ תַחְתֵּיהֶ֖ם עַד־הַגֹּלָֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: For there fell many slain, because the war was of God. And they dwelt in their stead until the captivity.

jps.text: For there fell many slain, because the war was of God. And they dwelt in their stead until the captivity.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֗י חֲצִי֙ שֵׁ֣בֶט מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה יָשְׁב֖וּ בָּאָ֑רֶץ מִבָּשָׁ֞ן עַד־בַּ֧עַל חֶרְמֹ֛ון וּשְׂנִ֥יר וְהַר־חֶרְמֹ֖ון הֵ֥מָּה רָבֽוּ׃
verses.englishText: And the children of the half-tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land, from Bashan unto Baal-hermon and Senir and mount Hermon, where they increased.

jps.text: And the children of the half-tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land, from Bashan unto Baal-hermon and Senir and mount Hermon, where they increased.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֖לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֣י בֵית־אֲבֹותָ֑ם וְעֵ֡פֶר וְיִשְׁעִ֡י וֶאֱלִיאֵ֡ל וְ֠עַזְרִיאֵל וְיִרְמְיָ֨ה וְהֹודַוְיָ֜ה וְיַחְדִּיאֵ֗ל אֲנָשִׁים֙ גִּבֹּ֣ורֵי חַ֔יִל אַנְשֵׁ֣י שֵׁמֹ֔ות רָאשִׁ֖ים לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And these were the heads of their fathers' houses: Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, heads of their fathers' houses.

jps.text: And these were the heads of their fathers' houses: Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, heads of their fathers' houses.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽמְעֲל֔וּ בֵּאלֹהֵ֖י אֲבֹותֵיהֶ֑ם וַיִּזְנ֗וּ אַחֲרֵי֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י עַמֵּי־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־הִשְׁמִ֥יד אֱלֹהִ֖ים מִפְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they broke faith with the God of their fathers, and went astray after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God destroyed before them.

jps.text: And they broke faith with the God of their fathers, and went astray after the gods of the peoples of the land, whom God destroyed before them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּעַר֩ אֱלֹהֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל אֶת־ר֣וּחַ ׀ פּ֣וּל מֶֽלֶךְ־אַשּׁ֗וּר וְאֶת־ר֙וּחַ֙ תִּלְּגַ֤ת פִּלְנֶ֙סֶר֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ אַשּׁ֔וּר וַיַּגְלֵם֙ לָראוּבֵנִ֣י וְלַגָּדִ֔י וְלַחֲצִ֖י שֵׁ֣בֶט מְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וַ֠יְבִיאֵם לַחְלַ֨ח וְחָבֹ֤ור וְהָרָא֙ וּנְהַ֣ר גֹּוזָ֔ן עַ֖ד הַיֹּ֥ום הַזֶּֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river of Gozan, unto this day.

jps.text: And the God of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tillegath-pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, even the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half-tribe of Manasseh, and brought them unto Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river of Gozan, unto this day.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י לֵוִ֑י גֵּרְשֹׁ֕ון קְהָ֖ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

jps.text: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמְרָ֣ם יִצְהָ֔ר וְחֶבְרֹ֖ון וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

jps.text: And the sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י עַמְרָ֔ם אַהֲרֹ֥ן וּמֹשֶׁ֖ה וּמִרְיָ֑ם ס וּבְנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֔ן נָדָב֙ וַאֲבִיה֔וּא אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וְאִיתָמָֽר׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the children of Amram: Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. And the sons of Aaron: Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

jps.text: And the children of Amram: Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. And the sons of Aaron: Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

verses.hebrewText: אֶלְעָזָר֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־פִּֽינְחָ֔ס פִּֽינְחָ֖ס הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲבִישֽׁוּעַ׃
verses.englishText: Eleazar begot Phinehas, Phinehas begot Abishua;

jps.text: Eleazar begot Phinehas, Phinehas begot Abishua;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲבִישׁ֙וּעַ֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־בֻּקִּ֔י וּבֻקִּ֖י הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־עֻזִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: and Abishua begot Bukki, and Bukki begot Uzzi;

jps.text: and Abishua begot Bukki, and Bukki begot Uzzi;

verses.hebrewText: וְעֻזִּי֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־זְרַֽחְיָ֔ה וּֽזְרַֽחְיָ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־מְרָיֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: and Uzzi begot Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begot Meraioth;

jps.text: and Uzzi begot Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begot Meraioth;

verses.hebrewText: מְרָיֹות֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־אֲמַרְיָ֔ה וַאֲמַרְיָ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִיטֽוּב׃
verses.englishText: Meraioth begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;

jps.text: Meraioth begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחִיטוּב֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־צָדֹ֔וק וְצָדֹ֖וק הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִימָֽעַץ׃
verses.englishText: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Ahimaaz;

jps.text: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Ahimaaz;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחִימַ֙עַץ֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָ֔ה וַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־יֹוחָנָֽן׃
verses.englishText: and Ahimaaz begot Azariah, and Azariah begot Johanan;

jps.text: and Ahimaaz begot Azariah, and Azariah begot Johanan;

verses.hebrewText: וְיֹוחָנָ֖ן הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָ֑ה ה֚וּא אֲשֶׁ֣ר כִּהֵ֔ן בַּבַּ֕יִת אֲשֶׁר־בָּנָ֥ה שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.englishText: and Johanan begot Azariah — he it is that executed the priest's office in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem —

jps.text: and Johanan begot Azariah — he it is that executed the priest's office in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem —

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֥ולֶד עֲזַרְיָ֖ה אֶת־אֲמַרְיָ֑ה וַאֲמַרְיָ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִיטֽוּב׃
verses.englishText: and Azariah begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;

jps.text: and Azariah begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחִיטוּב֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־צָדֹ֔וק וְצָדֹ֖וק הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Shallum;

jps.text: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Shallum;

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׁלּוּם֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־חִלְקִיָּ֔ה וְחִלְקִיָּ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Shallum begot Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begot Azariah;

jps.text: and Shallum begot Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begot Azariah;

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲזַרְיָה֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שְׂרָיָ֔ה וּשְׂרָיָ֖ה הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־יְהֹוצָדָֽק׃
verses.englishText: and Azariah begot Seraiah, and Seraiah begot Jehozadak;

jps.text: and Azariah begot Seraiah, and Seraiah begot Jehozadak;

verses.hebrewText: וִיהֹוצָדָ֣ק הָלַ֔ךְ בְּהַגְלֹ֣ות יְהוָ֔ה אֶת־יְהוּדָ֖ה וִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם בְּיַ֖ד נְבֻכַדְנֶאצַּֽר׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Jehozadak went into captivity, when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

jps.text: and Jehozadak went into captivity, when the LORD carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י לֵוִ֑י גֵּרְשֹׁ֕ם קְהָ֖ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath and Merari.

jps.text: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath and Merari.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֛לֶּה שְׁמֹ֥ות בְּֽנֵי־גֵרְשֹׁ֖ום לִבְנִ֥י וְשִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And these are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni, and Shimei.

jps.text: And these are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni, and Shimei.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמְרָ֣ם וְיִצְהָ֔ר וְחֶבְרֹ֖ון וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Kohath were Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

jps.text: And the sons of Kohath were Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֥י מְרָרִ֖י מַחְלִ֣י וּמֻשִׁ֑י וְאֵ֛לֶּה מִשְׁפְּחֹ֥ות הַלֵּוִ֖י לַאֲבֹותֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Merari: Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers' houses.

jps.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers' houses.

verses.hebrewText: לְֽגֵרְשֹׁ֑ום לִבְנִ֥י בְנֹ֛ו יַ֥חַת בְּנֹ֖ו זִמָּ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son;

jps.text: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son;

verses.hebrewText: יֹואָ֤ח בְּנֹו֙ עִדֹּ֣ו בְנֹ֔ו זֶ֥רַח בְּנֹ֖ו יְאָתְרַ֥י בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeatherai his son.

jps.text: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeatherai his son.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמִּינָדָ֣ב בְּנֹ֔ו קֹ֥רַח בְּנֹ֖ו אַסִּ֥יר בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son;

jps.text: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son;

verses.hebrewText: אֶלְקָנָ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו וְאֶבְיָסָ֥ף בְּנֹ֖ו וְאַסִּ֥יר בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son;

jps.text: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son;

verses.hebrewText: תַּ֤חַת בְּנֹו֙ אוּרִיאֵ֣ל בְּנֹ֔ו עֻזִּיָּ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו וְשָׁא֥וּל בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

jps.text: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵי֙ אֶלְקָנָ֔ה עֲמָשַׂ֖י וַאֲחִימֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Elkanah: Amasai, and Ahimoth.

jps.text: And the sons of Elkanah: Amasai, and Ahimoth.

verses.hebrewText: אֶלְקָנָ֑ה *בְּנֹו (בְּנֵי֙) אֶלְקָנָ֔ה צֹופַ֥י בְּנֹ֖ו וְנַ֥חַת בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah: Zophai his son, and Nahath his son;

jps.text: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah: Zophai his son, and Nahath his son;

verses.hebrewText: אֱלִיאָ֥ב בְּנֹ֛ו יְרֹחָ֥ם בְּנֹ֖ו אֶלְקָנָ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

jps.text: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֧י שְׁמוּאֵ֛ל הַבְּכֹ֥ר וַשְׁנִ֖י וַאֲבִיָּֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Samuel: the first-born Vashni; then Abiah.

jps.text: And the sons of Samuel: the first-born Vashni; then Abiah.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֥י מְרָרִ֖י מַחְלִ֑י לִבְנִ֥י בְנֹ֛ו שִׁמְעִ֥י בְנֹ֖ו עֻזָּ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Merari: Mahli; Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son;

jps.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli; Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son;

verses.hebrewText: שִׁמְעָ֥א בְנֹ֛ו חַגִּיָּ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו עֲשָׂיָ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃ פ
verses.englishText: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

jps.text: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֗לֶּה אֲשֶׁ֨ר הֶעֱמִ֥יד דָּוִ֛יד עַל־יְדֵי־שִׁ֖יר בֵּ֣ית יְהוָ֑ה מִמְּנֹ֖וחַ הָאָרֹֽון׃
verses.englishText: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.

jps.text: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the LORD, after that the ark had rest.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֨וּ מְשָׁרְתִ֜ים לִפְנֵ֨י מִשְׁכַּ֤ן אֹֽהֶל־מֹועֵד֙ בַּשִּׁ֔יר עַד־בְּנֹ֧ות שְׁלֹמֹ֛ה אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהוָ֖ה בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַיַּעַמְד֥וּ כְמִשְׁפָּטָ֖ם עַל־עֲבֹודָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they ministered with song before the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem; and they took their station at their service according to their order.

jps.text: And they ministered with song before the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, until Solomon had built the house of the LORD in Jerusalem; and they took their station at their service according to their order.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֥לֶּה הָעֹמְדִ֖ים וּבְנֵיהֶ֑ם מִבְּנֵי֙ הַקְּהָתִ֔י הֵימָן֙ הַמְשֹׁורֵ֔ר בֶּן־יֹואֵ֖ל בֶּן־שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And these are they that took their station, and their sons. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel;

jps.text: And these are they that took their station, and their sons. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה֙ בֶּן־יְרֹחָ֔ם בֶּן־אֱלִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־תֹּֽוחַ׃
verses.englishText: the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah;

jps.text: the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־*צִיף (צוּף֙) בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָ֔ה בֶּן־מַ֖חַת בֶּן־עֲמָשָֽׂי׃
verses.englishText: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai;

jps.text: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה֙ בֶּן־יֹואֵ֔ל בֶּן־עֲזַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־צְפַנְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah;

jps.text: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־תַּ֙חַת֙ בֶּן־אַסִּ֔יר בֶּן־אֶבְיָסָ֖ף בֶּן־קֹֽרַח׃
verses.englishText: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah;

jps.text: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־יִצְהָ֣ר בֶּן־קְהָ֔ת בֶּן־לֵוִ֖י בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

jps.text: the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָחִ֣יו אָסָ֔ף הָעֹמֵ֖ד עַל־יְמִינֹ֑ו אָסָ֥ף בֶּן־בֶּרֶכְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־שִׁמְעָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand; even Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea;

jps.text: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand; even Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־מִיכָאֵ֥ל בֶּן־בַּעֲשֵׂיָ֖ה בֶּן־מַלְכִּיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah;

jps.text: the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־אֶתְנִ֥י בֶן־זֶ֖רַח בֶּן־עֲדָיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah;

jps.text: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־אֵיתָ֥ן בֶּן־זִמָּ֖ה בֶּן־שִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei;

jps.text: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־יַ֥חַת בֶּן־גֵּרְשֹׁ֖ם בֶּן־לֵוִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

jps.text: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֧י מְרָרִ֛י אֲחֵיהֶ֖ם עַֽל־הַשְּׂמֹ֑אול אֵיתָן֙ בֶּן־קִישִׁ֔י בֶּן־עַבְדִּ֖י בֶּן־מַלּֽוּךְ׃
verses.englishText: And on the left hand their brethren the sons of Merari: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch;

jps.text: And on the left hand their brethren the sons of Merari: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־חֲשַׁבְיָ֥ה בֶן־אֲמַצְיָ֖ה בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah;

jps.text: the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־אַמְצִ֥י בֶן־בָּנִ֖י בֶּן־שָֽׁמֶר׃
verses.englishText: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer;

jps.text: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּן־מַחְלִי֙ בֶּן־מוּשִׁ֔י בֶּן־מְרָרִ֖י בֶּן־לֵוִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

jps.text: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם הַלְוִיִּ֑ם נְתוּנִ֕ים לְכָ֨ל־עֲבֹודַ֔ת מִשְׁכַּ֖ן בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And their brethren the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

jps.text: And their brethren the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of the house of God.
