verses.hebrewText: וְֽאַהֲרֹ֨ן וּבָנָ֜יו מַקְטִירִ֨ים עַל־מִזְבַּ֤ח הָֽעֹולָה֙ וְעַל־מִזְבַּ֣ח הַקְּטֹ֔רֶת לְכֹ֕ל מְלֶ֖אכֶת קֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֑ים וּלְכַפֵּר֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כְּכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוָּ֔ה מֹשֶׁ֖ה עֶ֥בֶד הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of burnt-offering, and upon the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

jps.text: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of burnt-offering, and upon the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֑ן אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בְּנֹ֛ו פִּֽינְחָ֥ס בְּנֹ֖ו אֲבִישׁ֥וּעַ בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And these are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son;

jps.text: And these are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son;

verses.hebrewText: בֻּקִּ֥י בְנֹ֛ו עֻזִּ֥י בְנֹ֖ו זְרַֽחְיָ֥ה בְנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son;

jps.text: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son;

verses.hebrewText: מְרָיֹ֥ות בְּנֹ֛ו אֲמַרְיָ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו אֲחִיט֥וּב בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son;

jps.text: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son;

verses.hebrewText: צָדֹ֥וק בְּנֹ֖ו אֲחִימַ֥עַץ בְּנֹֽו׃ ס
verses.englishText: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

jps.text: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ מֹושְׁבֹותָ֔ם לְטִירֹותָ֖ם בִּגְבוּלָ֑ם לִבְנֵ֤י אַהֲרֹן֙ לְמִשְׁפַּחַ֣ת הַקְּהָתִ֔י כִּ֥י לָהֶ֖ם הָיָ֥ה הַגֹּורָֽל׃
verses.englishText: Now these are their dwelling-places according to their encampments in their borders: to the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, for theirs was the first lot,

jps.text: Now these are their dwelling-places according to their encampments in their borders: to the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites, for theirs was the first lot,

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּתְּנ֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם אֶת־חֶבְרֹ֖ון בְּאֶ֣רֶץ יְהוּדָ֑ה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֖יהָ סְבִיבֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: to them they gave Hebron in the land of Judah, and the open land round about it;

jps.text: to them they gave Hebron in the land of Judah, and the open land round about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־שְׂדֵ֥ה הָעִ֖יר וְאֶת־חֲצֵרֶ֑יהָ נָתְנ֖וּ לְכָלֵ֥ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: but the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

jps.text: but the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

verses.hebrewText: וְלִבְנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֗ן נָתְנוּ֙ אֶת־עָרֵ֣י הַמִּקְלָ֔ט אֶת־חֶבְרֹ֥ון וְאֶת־לִבְנָ֖ה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־יַתִּ֥ר וְאֶֽת־אֶשְׁתְּמֹ֖עַ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the city of refuge, Hebron; Libnah also with the open land about it, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa with the open land about it;

jps.text: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the city of refuge, Hebron; Libnah also with the open land about it, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־חִילֵז֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ אֶת־דְּבִ֖יר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and Hilen with the open land about it, Debir with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Hilen with the open land about it, Debir with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־עָשָׁן֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית שֶׁ֖מֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Ashan with the open land about it, and Beth-shemesh with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Ashan with the open land about it, and Beth-shemesh with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה בִנְיָמִ֗ן אֶת־גֶּ֤בַע וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֙יהָ֙ וְאֶת־עָלֶ֣מֶת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־עֲנָתֹ֖ות וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ כָּל־עָרֵיהֶ֛ם שְׁלֹשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֥ה עִ֖יר בְּמִשְׁפְּחֹותֵיהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: and out of the tribe of Benjamin: Geba with the open land about it, and Alemeth with the open land about it, and Anathoth with the open land about it. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

jps.text: and out of the tribe of Benjamin: Geba with the open land about it, and Alemeth with the open land about it, and Anathoth with the open land about it. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

verses.hebrewText: וְלִבְנֵ֨י קְהָ֜ת הַנֹּותָרִ֗ים מִמִּשְׁפַּ֣חַת הַמַּטֶּ֡ה מִֽ֠מַּחֲצִית מַטֵּ֨ה חֲצִ֧י מְנַשֶּׁ֛ה בַּגֹּורָ֖ל עָרִ֥ים עָֽשֶׂר׃ ס
verses.englishText: And unto the rest of the sons of Kohath were given by lot, out of the family of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.

jps.text: And unto the rest of the sons of Kohath were given by lot, out of the family of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.

verses.hebrewText: וְלִבְנֵ֨י גֵרְשֹׁ֜ום לְמִשְׁפְּחֹותָ֗ם מִמַּטֵּ֣ה יִ֠שָׂשכָר וּמִמַּטֵּ֨ה אָשֵׁ֜ר וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה נַפְתָּלִ֗י וּמִמַּטֵּ֤ה מְנַשֶּׁה֙ בַּבָּשָׁ֔ן עָרִ֖ים שְׁלֹ֥שׁ עֶשְׂרֵֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And to the sons of Gershom, according to their families, out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

jps.text: And to the sons of Gershom, according to their families, out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

verses.hebrewText: לִבְנֵ֨י מְרָרִ֜י לְמִשְׁפְּחֹותָ֗ם מִמַּטֵּ֣ה רְ֠אוּבֵן וּֽמִמַּטֵּה־גָ֞ד וּמִמַּטֵּ֤ה זְבוּלֻן֙ בַּגֹּורָ֔ל עָרִ֖ים שְׁתֵּ֥ים עֶשְׂרֵֽה׃
verses.englishText: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, according to their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

jps.text: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, according to their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְּנ֥וּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לַלְוִיִּ֑ם אֶת־הֶעָרִ֖ים וְאֶת־מִגְרְשֵׁיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: So the children of Israel gave to the Levites the cities with the open land about them.

jps.text: So the children of Israel gave to the Levites the cities with the open land about them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְּנ֣וּ בַגֹּורָ֗ל מִמַּטֵּ֤ה בְנֵי־יְהוּדָה֙ וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה בְנֵי־שִׁמְעֹ֔ון וּמִמַּטֵּ֖ה בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֑ן אֵ֚ת הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרְא֥וּ אֶתְהֶ֖ם בְּשֵׁמֹֽות׃ ס
verses.englishText: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities which are mentioned by name.

jps.text: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities which are mentioned by name.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִֽמִּשְׁפְּחֹ֖ות בְּנֵ֣י קְהָ֑ת וַיְהִי֙ עָרֵ֣י גְבוּלָ֔ם מִמַּטֵּ֖ה אֶפְרָֽיִם׃
verses.englishText: And some of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their borders out of the tribe of Ephraim.

jps.text: And some of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their borders out of the tribe of Ephraim.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְּנ֨וּ לָהֶ֜ם אֶת־עָרֵ֧י הַמִּקְלָ֛ט אֶת־שְׁכֶ֥ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֖יהָ בְּהַ֣ר אֶפְרָ֑יִם וְאֶת־גֶּ֖זֶר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: And they gave unto them the city of refuge, Shechem in the hill-country of Ephraim with the open land about it; Gezer also with the open land about it;

jps.text: And they gave unto them the city of refuge, Shechem in the hill-country of Ephraim with the open land about it; Gezer also with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶֽת־יָקְמְעָם֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית חֹורֹ֖ון וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and Jokmeam with the open land about it, and Bethhoron with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Jokmeam with the open land about it, and Bethhoron with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־אַיָּלֹון֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־גַּת־רִמֹּ֖ון וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ פ
verses.englishText: and Aijalon with the open land about it, and Gath-rimmon with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Aijalon with the open land about it, and Gath-rimmon with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִֽמַּחֲצִית֙ מַטֵּ֣ה מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אֶת־עָנֵר֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בִּלְעָ֖ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ לְמִשְׁפַּ֥חַת לִבְנֵי־קְהָ֖ת הַנֹּותָרִֽים׃ פ
verses.englishText: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Aner with the open land about it, and Bileam with the open land about it, for the rest of the family of the sons of Kohath.

jps.text: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh: Aner with the open land about it, and Bileam with the open land about it, for the rest of the family of the sons of Kohath.

verses.hebrewText: לִבְנֵי֮ גֵּרְשֹׁום֒ מִמִּשְׁפַּ֗חַת חֲצִי֙ מַטֵּ֣ה מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אֶת־גֹּולָ֥ן בַּבָּשָׁ֖ן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־עַשְׁתָּרֹ֖ות וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ ס
verses.englishText: Unto the sons of Gershom were given, out of the family of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with the open land about it, and Ashtaroth with the open land about it;

jps.text: Unto the sons of Gershom were given, out of the family of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with the open land about it, and Ashtaroth with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה יִשָׂשכָ֔ר אֶת־קֶ֖דֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ אֶת־דָּבְרַ֖ת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh with the open land about it, Dobrath with the open land about it;

jps.text: and out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh with the open land about it, Dobrath with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־רָאמֹות֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־עָנֵ֖ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Ramoth with the open land about it, and Anem with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Ramoth with the open land about it, and Anem with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה אָשֵׁ֔ר אֶת־מָשָׁ֖ל וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־עַבְדֹּ֖ון וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal with the open land about it, and Abdon with the open land about it;

jps.text: and out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal with the open land about it, and Abdon with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־חוּקֹק֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־רְחֹ֖ב וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and Hukok with the open land about it; and Rehob with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Hukok with the open land about it; and Rehob with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה נַפְתָּלִ֗י אֶת־קֶ֤דֶשׁ בַּגָּלִיל֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־חַמֹּ֖ון וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־קִרְיָתַ֖יִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ ס
verses.englishText: and out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee with the open land about it, and Hammon with the open land about it, and Kiriathaim with the open land about it.

jps.text: and out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee with the open land about it, and Hammon with the open land about it, and Kiriathaim with the open land about it.

verses.hebrewText: לִבְנֵ֣י מְרָרִי֮ הַנֹּותָרִים֒ מִמַּטֵּ֣ה זְבוּלֻ֔ן אֶת־רִמֹּונֹ֖ו וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ אֶת־תָּבֹ֖ור וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Unto the rest of the Levites, the sons of Merari, were given, out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono with the open land about it, Tabor with the open land about it;

jps.text: Unto the rest of the Levites, the sons of Merari, were given, out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono with the open land about it, Tabor with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמֵעֵ֜בֶר לְיַרְדֵּ֣ן יְרֵחֹו֮ לְמִזְרַ֣ח הַיַּרְדֵּן֒ מִמַּטֵּ֣ה רְאוּבֵ֔ן אֶת־בֶּ֥צֶר בַּמִּדְבָּ֖ר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־יַ֖הְצָה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, were given them, out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with the open land about it, and Jahaz with the open land about it,

jps.text: and beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, were given them, out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with the open land about it, and Jahaz with the open land about it,

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־קְדֵמֹות֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־מֵיפַ֖עַת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and Kedemoth with the open land about it, and Mephaath with the open land about it;

jps.text: and Kedemoth with the open land about it, and Mephaath with the open land about it;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִ֨מַּטֵּה־גָ֔ד אֶת־רָאמֹ֥ות בַּגִּלְעָ֖ד וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶֽת־מַחֲנַ֖יִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.englishText: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with the open land about it, and Mahanaim with the open land about it,

jps.text: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with the open land about it, and Mahanaim with the open land about it,

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־חֶשְׁבֹּון֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־יַעְזֵ֖יר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Heshbon with the open land about it, and Jazer with the open land about it.

jps.text: and Heshbon with the open land about it, and Jazer with the open land about it.

verses.hebrewText: וְלִבְנֵ֣י יִשָׂשכָ֗ר תֹּולָ֧ע וּפוּאָ֛ה *יָשִׁיב (יָשׁ֥וּב) וְשִׁמְרֹ֖ון אַרְבָּעָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And of the sons of Issachar: Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.

jps.text: And of the sons of Issachar: Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י תֹולָ֗ע עֻזִּ֡י וּרְפָיָ֡ה וִֽ֠ירִיאֵל וְיַחְמַ֨י וְיִבְשָׂ֜ם וּשְׁמוּאֵ֗ל רָאשִׁ֤ים לְבֵית־אֲבֹותָם֙ לְתֹולָ֔ע גִּבֹּ֥ורֵי חַ֖יִל לְתֹלְדֹותָ֑ם מִסְפָּרָם֙ בִּימֵ֣י דָוִ֔יד עֶשְׂרִֽים־וּשְׁנַ֥יִם אֶ֖לֶף וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵאֹֽות׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Tola: Uzzi and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour according to their generations, even of Tola; their number in the days of David was two and twenty thousand and six hundred.

jps.text: And the sons of Tola: Uzzi and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Ibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour according to their generations, even of Tola; their number in the days of David was two and twenty thousand and six hundred.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י עֻזִּ֖י יִֽזְרַֽחְיָ֑ה וּבְנֵ֣י יִֽזְרַֽחְיָ֗ה מִֽיכָאֵ֡ל וְ֠עֹבַדְיָה וְיֹואֵ֧ל יִשִּׁיָּ֛ה חֲמִשָּׁ֖ה רָאשִׁ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Uzzi: Izrahiah; and the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Isshiah, five; all of them chief men.

jps.text: And the sons of Uzzi: Izrahiah; and the sons of Izrahiah: Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Isshiah, five; all of them chief men.

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲלֵיהֶ֨ם לְתֹלְדֹותָ֜ם לְבֵ֣ית אֲבֹותָ֗ם גְּדוּדֵי֙ צְבָ֣א מִלְחָמָ֔ה שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֖ה אָ֑לֶף כִּֽי־הִרְבּ֥וּ נָשִׁ֖ים וּבָנִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And with them, by their generations, after their fathers' houses, were bands of the host for war, six and thirty thousand; for they had many wives and sons.

jps.text: And with them, by their generations, after their fathers' houses, were bands of the host for war, six and thirty thousand; for they had many wives and sons.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֗ם לְכֹל֙ מִשְׁפְּחֹ֣ות יִשָׂשכָ֔ר גִּבֹּורֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים שְׁמֹונִ֤ים וְשִׁבְעָה֙ אֶ֔לֶף הִתְיַחְשָׂ֖ם לַכֹּֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar, mighty men of valour, reckoned in all by genealogy, were fourscore and seven thousand.

jps.text: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar, mighty men of valour, reckoned in all by genealogy, were fourscore and seven thousand.

verses.hebrewText: בִּנְיָמִ֗ן בֶּ֧לַע וָבֶ֛כֶר וִידִֽיעֲאֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

jps.text: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י בֶ֗לַע אֶצְבֹּ֡ון וְעֻזִּ֡י וְ֠עֻזִּיאֵל וִירִימֹ֨ות וְעִירִ֜י חֲמִשָּׁ֗ה רָאשֵׁי֙ בֵּ֣ית אָבֹ֔ות גִּבֹּורֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֗ם עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וּשְׁנַ֙יִם֙ אֶ֔לֶף וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֖ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the sons of Bela: Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of fathers' houses, mighty men of valour; and they were reckoned by genealogy twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.

jps.text: And the sons of Bela: Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of fathers' houses, mighty men of valour; and they were reckoned by genealogy twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י בֶ֗כֶר זְמִירָ֡ה וְיֹועָ֡שׁ וֶ֠אֱלִיעֶזֶר וְאֶלְיֹועֵינַ֤י וְעָמְרִי֙ וִירֵמֹ֣ות וַאֲבִיָּ֔ה וַעֲנָתֹ֖ות וְעָלָ֑מֶת כָּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵי־בָֽכֶר׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Becher: Zemirah, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jeremoth, and Abijah, and Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.

jps.text: And the sons of Becher: Zemirah, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jeremoth, and Abijah, and Anathoth, and Alemeth. All these were the sons of Becher.

verses.hebrewText: וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֣ם לְתֹלְדֹותָ֗ם רָאשֵׁי֙ בֵּ֣ית אֲבֹותָ֔ם גִּבֹּורֵ֖י חָ֑יִל עֶשְׂרִ֥ים אֶ֖לֶף וּמָאתָֽיִם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And they were reckoned by genealogy, after their generations, heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour, twenty thousand and two hundred.

jps.text: And they were reckoned by genealogy, after their generations, heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour, twenty thousand and two hundred.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י יְדִיעֲאֵ֖ל בִּלְהָ֑ן וּבְנֵ֣י בִלְהָ֗ן *יְעִישׁ (יְע֡וּשׁ) וּ֠בִנְיָמִן וְאֵה֤וּד וּֽכְנַעֲנָה֙ וְזֵיתָ֔ן וְתַרְשִׁ֖ישׁ וַאֲחִישָֽׁחַר׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jediael: Bilhan; and the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tarshish, and Ahishahar.

jps.text: And the sons of Jediael: Bilhan; and the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tarshish, and Ahishahar.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אֵ֜לֶּה בְּנֵ֤י יְדִֽיעֲאֵל֙ לְרָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָבֹ֔ות גִּבֹּורֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים שִׁבְעָֽה־עָשָׂ֥ר אֶ֙לֶף֙ וּמָאתַ֔יִם יֹצְאֵ֥י צָבָ֖א לַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.englishText: All these were sons of Jediael, even heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour, seventeen thousand and two hundred, that were able to go forth in the host for war.

jps.text: All these were sons of Jediael, even heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour, seventeen thousand and two hundred, that were able to go forth in the host for war.

verses.hebrewText: וְשֻׁפִּ֤ם וְחֻפִּם֙ בְּנֵ֣י עִ֔יר חֻשִׁ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י אַחֵֽר׃
verses.englishText: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the sons of Ir, Hushim, the son of another.

jps.text: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the sons of Ir, Hushim, the son of another.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י נַפְתָּלִ֗י יַחֲצִיאֵ֧ל וְגוּנִ֛י וְיֵ֥צֶר וְשַׁלּ֖וּם בְּנֵ֥י בִלְהָֽה׃ פ
verses.englishText: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

jps.text: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אַשְׂרִיאֵ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָלָ֑דָה פִּֽילַגְשֹׁו֙ הָֽאֲרַמִּיָּ֔ה יָלְדָ֕ה אֶת־מָכִ֖יר אֲבִ֥י גִלְעָֽד׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his wife bore — his concubine the Aramitess bore Machir the father of Gilead;

jps.text: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, whom his wife bore — his concubine the Aramitess bore Machir the father of Gilead;

verses.hebrewText: וּמָכִ֞יר לָקַ֤ח אִשָּׁה֙ לְחֻפִּ֣ים וּלְשֻׁפִּ֔ים וְשֵׁ֤ם אֲחֹתֹו֙ מַעֲכָ֔ה וְשֵׁ֥ם הַשֵּׁנִ֖י צְלָפְחָ֑ד וַתִּהְיֶ֥נָה לִצְלָפְחָ֖ד בָּנֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: and Machir took a wife of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister's name was Maacah — and the name of the second was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.

jps.text: and Machir took a wife of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister's name was Maacah — and the name of the second was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.

verses.hebrewText: וַתֵּ֨לֶד מַעֲכָ֤ה אֵֽשֶׁת־מָכִיר֙ בֵּ֔ן וַתִּקְרָ֤א שְׁמֹו֙ פֶּ֔רֶשׁ וְשֵׁ֥ם אָחִ֖יו שָׁ֑רֶשׁ וּבָנָ֖יו אוּלָ֥ם וָרָֽקֶם׃
verses.englishText: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rekem.

jps.text: And Maacah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rekem.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י אוּלָ֖ם בְּדָ֑ן אֵ֚לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י גִלְעָ֔ד בֶּן־מָכִ֖יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

jps.text: And the sons of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֹתֹ֖ו הַמֹּלֶ֑כֶת יָלְדָה֙ אֶת־אִישְׁהֹ֔וד וְאֶת־אֲבִיעֶ֖זֶר וְאֶת־מַחְלָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ish-hod, and Abiezer, and Mahlah.

jps.text: And his sister Hammolecheth bore Ish-hod, and Abiezer, and Mahlah.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י שְׁמִידָ֑ע אַחְיָ֣ן וָשֶׁ֔כֶם וְלִקְחִ֖י וַאֲנִיעָֽם׃ פ
verses.englishText: And the sons of Shemida were Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

jps.text: And the sons of Shemida were Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֥י אֶפְרַ֖יִם שׁוּתָ֑לַח וּבֶ֤רֶד בְּנֹו֙ וְתַ֣חַת בְּנֹ֔ו וְאֶלְעָדָ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו וְתַ֥חַת בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah — and Bered was his son, and Tahath his son, and Eleadah his son, and Tahath his son,

jps.text: And the sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah — and Bered was his son, and Tahath his son, and Eleadah his son, and Tahath his son,

verses.hebrewText: וְזָבָ֥ד בְּנֹ֛ו וְשׁוּתֶ֥לַח בְּנֹ֖ו וְעֵ֣זֶר וְאֶלְעָ֑ד וַהֲרָג֗וּם אַנְשֵׁי־גַת֙ הַנֹּולָדִ֣ים בָּאָ֔רֶץ כִּ֣י יָרְד֔וּ לָקַ֖חַת אֶת־מִקְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.englishText: and Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son — and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in the land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

jps.text: and Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son — and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in the land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּתְאַבֵּ֛ל אֶפְרַ֥יִם אֲבִיהֶ֖ם יָמִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וַיָּבֹ֥אוּ אֶחָ֖יו לְנַחֲמֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

jps.text: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּבֹא֙ אֶל־אִשְׁתֹּ֔ו וַתַּ֖הַר וַתֵּ֣לֶד בֵּ֑ן וַיִּקְרָ֤א אֶת־שְׁמֹו֙ בְּרִיעָ֔ה כִּ֥י בְרָעָ֖ה הָיְתָ֥ה בְּבֵיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And he went in to his wife, and she conceived, and bore a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.

jps.text: And he went in to his wife, and she conceived, and bore a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.

verses.hebrewText: וּבִתֹּ֣ו שֶׁאֱרָ֔ה וַתִּ֧בֶן אֶת־בֵּית־חֹורֹ֛ון הַתַּחְתֹּ֖ון וְאֶת־הָעֶלְיֹ֑ון וְאֵ֖ת אֻזֵּ֥ן שֶׁאֱרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And his daughter was Sheerah, who built Beth-horon the nether and the upper, and Uzzen-sheerah.

jps.text: And his daughter was Sheerah, who built Beth-horon the nether and the upper, and Uzzen-sheerah.

verses.hebrewText: וְרֶ֣פַח בְּנֹ֗ו וְרֶ֧שֶׁף וְתֶ֛לַח בְּנֹ֖ו וְתַ֥חַן בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And Rephah was his son, and Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son;

jps.text: And Rephah was his son, and Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son;

verses.hebrewText: לַעְדָּ֥ן בְּנֹ֛ו עַמִּיה֥וּד בְּנֹ֖ו אֱלִישָׁמָ֥ע בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son;

jps.text: Ladan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son;

verses.hebrewText: נֹ֥ון בְּנֹ֖ו יְהֹושֻׁ֥עַ בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: Nun his son, Joshua his son.

jps.text: Nun his son, Joshua his son.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֻזָּתָם֙ וּמֹ֣שְׁבֹותָ֔ם בֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל וּבְנֹתֶ֑יהָ וְלַמִּזְרָ֣ח נַעֲרָ֔ן וְלַֽמַּעֲרָ֗ב גֶּ֤זֶר וּבְנֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ וּשְׁכֶ֣ם וּבְנֹתֶ֔יהָ עַד־עַיָּ֖ה וּבְנֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: And their possessions and habitations were Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Aiah and the towns thereof;

jps.text: And their possessions and habitations were Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Aiah and the towns thereof;

verses.hebrewText: וְעַל־יְדֵ֣י בְנֵי־מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה בֵּית־שְׁאָ֤ן וּבְנֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ תַּעְנַ֣ךְ וּבְנֹתֶ֔יהָ מְגִדֹּ֥ו וּבְנֹותֶ֖יהָ דֹּ֣ור וּבְנֹותֶ֑יהָ בְּאֵ֙לֶּה֙ יָשְׁב֔וּ בְּנֵ֥י יֹוסֵ֖ף בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: and by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and the towns thereof, Taanach and the towns thereof, Megiddo and the towns thereof, Dor and the towns thereof. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

jps.text: and by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and the towns thereof, Taanach and the towns thereof, Megiddo and the towns thereof, Dor and the towns thereof. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֣י אָשֵׁ֗ר יִמְנָ֧ה וְיִשְׁוָ֛ה וְיִשְׁוִ֥י וּבְרִיעָ֖ה וְשֶׂ֥רַח אֲחֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Asher: Imnah, and Ishvah, and Ishvi, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.

jps.text: The sons of Asher: Imnah, and Ishvah, and Ishvi, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י בְרִיעָ֔ה חֶ֖בֶר וּמַלְכִּיאֵ֑ל ה֖וּא אֲבִ֥י *בִרְזֹות (בִרְזָֽיִת)׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.

jps.text: And the sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who was the father of Birzaith.

verses.hebrewText: וְחֶ֙בֶר֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יַפְלֵ֔ט וְאֶת־שֹׁומֵ֖ר וְאֶת־חֹותָ֑ם וְאֵ֖ת שׁוּעָ֥א אֲחֹותָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And Heber begot Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

jps.text: And Heber begot Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י יַפְלֵ֔ט פָּסַ֥ךְ וּבִמְהָ֖ל וְעַשְׁוָ֑ת אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י יַפְלֵֽט׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Japhlet: Pasach, and Bimhal, and Asvath. These are the children of Japhlet.

jps.text: And the sons of Japhlet: Pasach, and Bimhal, and Asvath. These are the children of Japhlet.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י שָׁ֑מֶר אֲחִ֥י *וְרֹוהֲגָה (וְרָהְגָּ֖ה) *יַחְבָּה (וְחֻבָּ֥ה) וַאֲרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Shemer: Ahi, and Rohgah, and Hubbah, and Aram.

jps.text: And the sons of Shemer: Ahi, and Rohgah, and Hubbah, and Aram.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־הֵ֖לֶם אָחִ֑יו צֹופַ֥ח וְיִמְנָ֖ע וְשֵׁ֥לֶשׁ וְעָמָֽל׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

jps.text: And the sons of Helem his brother: Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֖י צֹופָ֑ח ס֧וּחַ וְחַרְנֶ֛פֶר וְשׁוּעָ֖ל וּבֵרִ֥י וְיִמְרָֽה׃
verses.englishText: The sons of Zophah: Suah, and Harnepher, and Shaul, and Beri, and Imrah;

jps.text: The sons of Zophah: Suah, and Harnepher, and Shaul, and Beri, and Imrah;

verses.hebrewText: בֶּ֣צֶר וָהֹ֗וד וְשַׁמָּ֧א וְשִׁלְשָׁ֛ה וְיִתְרָ֖ן וּבְאֵרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilsha, and Ithran, and Beera.

jps.text: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilsha, and Ithran, and Beera.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י יֶ֑תֶר יְפֻנֶּ֥ה וּפִסְפָּ֖ה וַאְרָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Jether: Jephunneh, and Pispa, and Ara.

jps.text: And the sons of Jether: Jephunneh, and Pispa, and Ara.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י עֻלָּ֑א אָרַ֥ח וְחַנִּיאֵ֖ל וְרִצְיָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ulla: Arah, and Hanniel, and Rizia.

jps.text: And the sons of Ulla: Arah, and Hanniel, and Rizia.

verses.hebrewText: כָּל־אֵ֣לֶּה בְנֵי־אָ֠שֵׁר רָאשֵׁ֨י בֵית־הָאָבֹ֤ות בְּרוּרִים֙ גִּבֹּורֵ֣י חֲיָלִ֔ים רָאשֵׁ֖י הַנְּשִׂיאִ֑ים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֤ם בַּצָּבָא֙ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֔ה מִסְפָּרָ֣ם אֲנָשִׁ֔ים עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ ס
verses.englishText: All these were the children of Asher, heads of the fathers' houses, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number of them reckoned by genealogy for service in war was twenty and six thousand men.

jps.text: All these were the children of Asher, heads of the fathers' houses, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number of them reckoned by genealogy for service in war was twenty and six thousand men.

verses.hebrewText: וּבִ֨נְיָמִ֔ן הֹולִ֖יד אֶת־בֶּ֣לַע בְּכֹרֹ֑ו אַשְׁבֵּל֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וְאַחְרַ֖ח הַשְּׁלִישִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: And Benjamin begot Bela his first-born, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third;

jps.text: And Benjamin begot Bela his first-born, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third;

verses.hebrewText: נֹוחָה֙ הָֽרְבִיעִ֔י וְרָפָ֖א הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

jps.text: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בָנִ֖ים לְבָ֑לַע אַדָּ֥ר וְגֵרָ֖א וַאֲבִיהֽוּד׃
verses.englishText: And Bela had sons, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud;

jps.text: And Bela had sons, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲבִישׁ֥וּעַ וְנַעֲמָ֖ן וַאֲחֹֽוחַ׃
verses.englishText: and Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah;

jps.text: and Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah;

verses.hebrewText: וְגֵרָ֥א וּשְׁפוּפָ֖ן וְחוּרָֽם׃
verses.englishText: and Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

jps.text: and Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י אֵח֑וּד אֵ֣לֶּה הֵ֞ם רָאשֵׁ֤י אָבֹות֙ לְיֹ֣ושְׁבֵי גֶ֔בַע וַיַּגְל֖וּם אֶל־מָנָֽחַת׃
verses.englishText: And these are the sons of Ehud — these are the heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried captive to Manahath;

jps.text: And these are the sons of Ehud — these are the heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Geba, and they were carried captive to Manahath;

verses.hebrewText: וְנַעֲמָ֧ן וַאֲחִיָּ֛ה וְגֵרָ֖א ה֣וּא הֶגְלָ֑ם וְהֹולִ֥יד אֶת־עֻזָּ֖א וְאֶת־אֲחִיחֻֽד׃
verses.englishText: and Naaman, and Ahijah, and Gera, were they that carried them captive — and he begot Uzza, and Ahihud.

jps.text: and Naaman, and Ahijah, and Gera, were they that carried them captive — and he begot Uzza, and Ahihud.

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׁחֲרַ֗יִם הֹולִיד֙ בִּשְׂדֵ֣ה מֹואָ֔ב מִן־שִׁלְחֹ֖ו אֹתָ֑ם חוּשִׁ֥ים וְאֶֽת־בַּעֲרָ֖א נָשָֽׁיו׃
verses.englishText: And Shaharaim begot children in the field of Moab, after he had sent them away, to wit, Hushim and Baara his wives;

jps.text: And Shaharaim begot children in the field of Moab, after he had sent them away, to wit, Hushim and Baara his wives;

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֖ולֶד מִן־חֹ֣דֶשׁ אִשְׁתֹּ֑ו אֶת־יֹובָב֙ וְאֶת־צִבְיָ֔א וְאֶת־מֵישָׁ֖א וְאֶת־מַלְכָּֽם׃
verses.englishText: he begot of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcam;

jps.text: he begot of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcam;

verses.hebrewText: וְאֶת־יְע֥וּץ וְאֶת־שָֽׂכְיָ֖ה וְאֶת־מִרְמָ֑ה אֵ֥לֶּה בָנָ֖יו רָאשֵׁ֥י אָבֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: and Jeuz, and Sachiah, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers' houses.

jps.text: and Jeuz, and Sachiah, and Mirmah. These were his sons, heads of fathers' houses.

verses.hebrewText: וּמֵחֻשִׁ֛ים הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־אֲבִיט֖וּב וְאֶת־אֶלְפָּֽעַל׃
verses.englishText: and of Hushim he begot Abitub, and Elpaal.

jps.text: and of Hushim he begot Abitub, and Elpaal.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֣י אֶלְפַּ֔עַל עֵ֥בֶר וּמִשְׁעָ֖ם וָשָׁ֑מֶד ה֚וּא בָּנָ֣ה אֶת־אֹונֹ֔ו וְאֶת־לֹ֖ד וּבְנֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Elpaal: Eber, and Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof;

jps.text: And the sons of Elpaal: Eber, and Misham, and Shemed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof;

verses.hebrewText: וּבְרִעָ֣ה וָשֶׁ֔מַע הֵ֚מָּה רָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָבֹ֔ות לְיֹושְׁבֵ֖י אַיָּלֹ֑ון הֵ֥מָּה הִבְרִ֖יחוּ אֶת־יֹ֥ושְׁבֵי גַֽת׃
verses.englishText: and Beriah, and Shema, who were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who put to flight the inhabitants of Gath.

jps.text: and Beriah, and Shema, who were heads of fathers' houses of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who put to flight the inhabitants of Gath.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַחְיֹ֥ו שָׁשָׁ֖ק וִירֵמֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth;

jps.text: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth;

verses.hebrewText: וּזְבַדְיָ֥ה וַעֲרָ֖ד וָעָֽדֶר׃
verses.englishText: and Zebadiah, and Arad, and Eder;

jps.text: and Zebadiah, and Arad, and Eder;

verses.hebrewText: וּמִיכָאֵ֧ל וְיִשְׁפָּ֛ה וְיֹוחָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י בְרִיעָֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Michael, and Ishpah, and Joha, were the sons of Beriah.

jps.text: and Michael, and Ishpah, and Joha, were the sons of Beriah.

verses.hebrewText: וּזְבַדְיָ֥ה וּמְשֻׁלָּ֖ם וְחִזְקִ֥י וָחָֽבֶר׃
verses.englishText: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hizki, and Heber;

jps.text: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hizki, and Heber;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִשְׁמְרַ֧י וְיִזְלִיאָ֛ה וְיֹובָ֖ב בְּנֵ֥י אֶלְפָּֽעַל׃
verses.englishText: and Ishmerai, and Izliah, and Jobab, were the sons of Elpaal.

jps.text: and Ishmerai, and Izliah, and Jobab, were the sons of Elpaal.

verses.hebrewText: וְיָקִ֥ים וְזִכְרִ֖י וְזַבְדִּֽי׃
verses.englishText: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi;

jps.text: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi;

verses.hebrewText: וֶאֱלִיעֵנַ֥י וְצִלְּתַ֖י וֶאֱלִיאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: and Elienai, and Zillethai, and Eliel;

jps.text: and Elienai, and Zillethai, and Eliel;

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲדָיָ֧ה וּבְרָאיָ֛ה וְשִׁמְרָ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י שִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.englishText: and Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, were the sons of Shimei.

jps.text: and Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, were the sons of Shimei.

verses.hebrewText: וְיִשְׁפָּ֥ן וָעֵ֖בֶר וֶאֱלִיאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: And Ishpan, and Ebed, and Eliel;

jps.text: And Ishpan, and Ebed, and Eliel;

verses.hebrewText: וְעַבְדֹּ֥ון וְזִכְרִ֖י וְחָנָֽן׃
verses.englishText: and Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan;

jps.text: and Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan;

verses.hebrewText: וַחֲנַנְיָ֥ה וְעֵילָ֖ם וְעַנְתֹתִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Hananiah, and Elam, and Anthothiah;

jps.text: and Hananiah, and Elam, and Anthothiah;

verses.hebrewText: וְיִפְדְיָ֥ה *וּפְנִיאֵל (וּפְנוּאֵ֖ל) בְּנֵ֥י שָׁשָֽׁק׃
verses.englishText: and Iphdeiah, and Penuel, were the sons of Shashak.

jps.text: and Iphdeiah, and Penuel, were the sons of Shashak.

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׁמְשְׁרַ֥י וּשְׁחַרְיָ֖ה וַעֲתַלְיָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah;

jps.text: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah;

verses.hebrewText: וְיַעֲרֶשְׁיָ֧ה וְאֵלִיָּ֛ה וְזִכְרִ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יְרֹחָֽם׃
verses.englishText: and Jaareshiah, and Elijah, and Zichri, were the sons of Jeroham.

jps.text: and Jaareshiah, and Elijah, and Zichri, were the sons of Jeroham.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֥י אָבֹ֛ות לְתֹלְדֹותָ֖ם רָאשִׁ֑ים אֵ֖לֶּה יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ ס
verses.englishText: These were heads of fathers' houses throughout their generations, chief men; these dwelt in Jerusalem.

jps.text: These were heads of fathers' houses throughout their generations, chief men; these dwelt in Jerusalem.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְגִבְעֹ֥ון יָשְׁב֖וּ אֲבִ֣י גִבְעֹ֑ון וְשֵׁ֥ם אִשְׁתֹּ֖ו מַעֲכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, whose wife's name was Maacah;

jps.text: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, whose wife's name was Maacah;

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֹ֥ו הַבְּכֹ֖ור עַבְדֹּ֑ון וְצ֥וּר וְקִ֖ישׁ וּבַ֥עַל וְנָדָֽב׃
verses.englishText: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab;

jps.text: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab;

verses.hebrewText: וּגְדֹ֥ור וְאַחְיֹ֖ו וָזָֽכֶר׃
verses.englishText: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zecher.

jps.text: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zecher.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִקְלֹ֖ות הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שִׁמְאָ֑ה וְאַף־הֵ֗מָּה נֶ֧גֶד אֲחֵיהֶ֛ם יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם עִם־אֲחֵיהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Mikloth begot Shimeah. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

jps.text: And Mikloth begot Shimeah. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

verses.hebrewText: וְנֵר֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־קִ֔ישׁ וְקִ֖ישׁ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שָׁא֑וּל וְשָׁא֗וּל הֹולִ֤יד אֶת־יְהֹֽונָתָן֙ וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁ֔וּעַ וְאֶת־אֲבִֽינָדָ֖ב וְאֶת־אֶשְׁבָּֽעַל׃
verses.englishText: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

jps.text: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־יְהֹונָתָ֖ן מְרִ֣יב בָּ֑עַל וּמְרִ֥יב בַּ֖עַל הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־מִיכָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.

jps.text: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י מִיכָ֑ה פִּיתֹ֥ון וָמֶ֖לֶךְ וְתַאְרֵ֥עַ וְאָחָֽז׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Micah; Pithon, and Melech, and Taarea, and Ahaz.

jps.text: And the sons of Micah; Pithon, and Melech, and Taarea, and Ahaz.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָחָז֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יְהֹועַדָּ֔ה וִיהֹֽועַדָּ֗ה הֹולִ֛יד אֶת־עָלֶ֥מֶת וְאֶת־עַזְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־זִמְרִ֑י וְזִמְרִ֖י הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־מֹוצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And Ahaz begot Jehoaddah; and Jehoaddah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza;

jps.text: And Ahaz begot Jehoaddah; and Jehoaddah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza;

verses.hebrewText: וּמֹוצָ֖א הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־בִּנְעָ֑א רָפָ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו אֶלְעָשָׂ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו אָצֵ֥ל בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: and Moza begot Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

jps.text: and Moza begot Binea; Raphah was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּלְאָצֵל֮ שִׁשָּׁ֣ה בָנִים֒ וְאֵ֣לֶּה שְׁמֹותָ֗ם עַזְרִיקָ֥ם ׀ בֹּ֙כְרוּ֙ וְיִשְׁמָעֵ֣אל וּשְׁעַרְיָ֔ה וְעֹבַדְיָ֖ה וְחָנָ֑ן כָּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י אָצַֽל׃
verses.englishText: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

jps.text: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י עֵ֣שֶׁק אָחִ֑יו אוּלָ֣ם בְּכֹרֹ֔ו יְעוּשׁ֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וֽ͏ֶאֱלִיפֶ֖לֶט הַשְּׁלִשִֽׁי׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

jps.text: And the sons of Eshek his brother: Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּהְי֣וּ בְנֵי־א֠וּלָם אֲנָשִׁ֨ים גִּבֹּרֵי־חַ֜יִל דֹּ֣רְכֵי קֶ֗שֶׁת וּמַרְבִּ֤ים בָּנִים֙ וּבְנֵ֣י בָנִ֔ים מֵאָ֖ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֑ים כָּל־אֵ֖לֶּה מִבְּנֵ֥י בִנְיָמִֽן׃ פ
verses.englishText: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers; and had many sons, and sons' sons, a hundred and fifty. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.

jps.text: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers; and had many sons, and sons' sons, a hundred and fifty. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.

verses.hebrewText: וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ הִתְיַחְשׂ֔וּ וְהִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֔ים עַל־סֵ֖פֶר מַלְכֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וִיהוּדָ֛ה הָגְל֥וּ לְבָבֶ֖ל בְּמַעֲלָֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel; and Judah was carried away captive to Babylon because of their transgression.

jps.text: So all Israel were reckoned by genealogies; and, behold, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel; and Judah was carried away captive to Babylon because of their transgression.

verses.hebrewText: וְהַיֹּושְׁבִים֙ הָרִ֣אשֹׁנִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּאֲחֻזָּתָ֖ם בְּעָרֵיהֶ֑ם יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים הַלְוִיִּ֖ם וְהַנְּתִינִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, Israelites, the priests, the Levites, and the Nethinim.

jps.text: Now the first inhabitants that dwelt in their possessions in their cities were, Israelites, the priests, the Levites, and the Nethinim.

verses.hebrewText: וּבִירוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ יָשְׁב֔וּ מִן־בְּנֵ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה וּמִן־בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֑ן וּמִן־בְּנֵ֥י אֶפְרַ֖יִם וּמְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim and Manasseh:

jps.text: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim and Manasseh:

verses.hebrewText: עוּתַ֨י בֶּן־עַמִּיה֤וּד בֶּן־עָמְרִי֙ בֶּן־אִמְרִ֣י בֶן־*בָּנִימִן־ (בָּנִ֔י מִן)־בְּנֵי־פֶ֖רֶץ בֶּן־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.englishText: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Perez the son of Judah.

jps.text: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Perez the son of Judah.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־הַשִּׁ֣ילֹונִ֔י עֲשָׂיָ֥ה הַבְּכֹ֖ור וּבָנָֽיו׃
verses.englishText: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the first-born and his sons.

jps.text: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the first-born and his sons.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי־זֶ֖רַח יְעוּאֵ֑ל וַאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם שֵׁשׁ־מֵאֹ֥ות וְתִשְׁעִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.

jps.text: And of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel, and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־בְּנֵ֖י בִּנְיָמִ֑ן סַלּוּא֙ בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּ֔ם בֶּן־הֹודַוְיָ֖ה בֶּן־הַסְּנֻאָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And of the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah,

jps.text: And of the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah,

verses.hebrewText: וְיִבְנְיָה֙ בֶּן־יְרֹחָ֔ם וְאֵלָ֥ה בֶן־עֻזִּ֖י בֶּן־מִכְרִ֑י וּמְשֻׁלָּם֙ בֶּן־שְׁפַטְיָ֔ה בֶּן־רְעוּאֵ֖ל בֶּן־יִבְנִיָּֽה׃
verses.englishText: and Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibneiah;

jps.text: and Ibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Ibneiah;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶם֙ לְתֹ֣לְדֹותָ֔ם תְּשַׁ֥ע מֵאֹ֖ות וַחֲמִשִּׁ֣ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֑ה כָּל־אֵ֣לֶּה אֲנָשִׁ֔ים רָאשֵׁ֥י אָבֹ֖ות לְבֵ֥ית אֲבֹתֵיהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: and their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were heads of fathers' houses by their fathers' houses.

jps.text: and their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were heads of fathers' houses by their fathers' houses.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־הַֽכֹּהֲנִ֑ים יְדַֽעְיָ֥ה וִיהֹויָרִ֖יב וְיָכִֽין׃
verses.englishText: And of the priests: Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin;

jps.text: And of the priests: Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin;

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲזַרְיָ֨ה בֶן־חִלְקִיָּ֜ה בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּ֣ם בֶּן־צָדֹ֗וק בֶּן־מְרָיֹות֙ בֶּן־אֲחִיט֔וּב נְגִ֖יד בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ ס
verses.englishText: and Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;

jps.text: and Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;

verses.hebrewText: וַעֲדָיָה֙ בֶּן־יְרֹחָ֔ם בֶּן־פַּשְׁח֖וּר בֶּן־מַלְכִּיָּ֑ה וּמַעְשַׂ֨י בֶּן־עֲדִיאֵ֧ל בֶּן־יַחְזֵ֛רָה בֶּן־מְשֻׁלָּ֥ם בֶּן־מְשִׁלֵּמִ֖ית בֶּן־אִמֵּֽר׃
verses.englishText: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

jps.text: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֗ם רָאשִׁים֙ לְבֵ֣ית אֲבֹותָ֔ם אֶ֕לֶף וּשְׁבַ֥ע מֵאֹ֖ות וְשִׁשִּׁ֑ים גִּבֹּ֣ורֵי חֵ֔יל מְלֶ֖אכֶת עֲבֹודַ֥ת בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: and their brethren, heads of their fathers' houses, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

jps.text: and their brethren, heads of their fathers' houses, a thousand and seven hundred and threescore; very able men for the work of the service of the house of God.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִֽן־הַלְוִיִּ֑ם שְׁמַֽעְיָ֧ה בֶן־חַשּׁ֛וּב בֶּן־עַזְרִיקָ֥ם בֶּן־חֲשַׁבְיָ֖ה מִן־בְּנֵ֥י מְרָרִֽי׃
verses.englishText: And of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

jps.text: And of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

verses.hebrewText: וּבַקְבַּקַּ֥ר חֶ֖רֶשׁ וְגָלָ֑ל וּמַתַּנְיָה֙ בֶּן־מִיכָ֔א בֶּן־זִכְרִ֖י בֶּן־אָסָֽף׃
verses.englishText: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

jps.text: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal, and Mattaniah the son of Mica, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

verses.hebrewText: וְעֹבַדְיָה֙ בֶּֽן־שְׁמַֽעְיָ֔ה בֶּן־גָּלָ֖ל בֶּן־יְדוּת֑וּן וּבֶרֶכְיָ֤ה בֶן־אָסָא֙ בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָ֔ה הַיֹּושֵׁ֖ב בְּחַצְרֵ֥י נְטֹופָתִֽי׃
verses.englishText: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.

jps.text: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun, and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, that dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.

verses.hebrewText: וְהַשֹּׁעֲרִים֙ שַׁלּ֣וּם וְעַקּ֔וּב וְטַלְמֹ֖ן וַאֲחִימָ֑ן וַאֲחִיהֶ֥ם שַׁלּ֖וּם הָרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.englishText: And the porters: Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brother Shallum the chief;

jps.text: And the porters: Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brother Shallum the chief;

verses.hebrewText: וְֽעַד־הֵ֔נָּה בְּשַׁ֥עַר הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ מִזְרָ֑חָה הֵ֚מָּה הַשֹּׁ֣עֲרִ֔ים לְמַחֲנֹ֖ות בְּנֵ֥י לֵוִֽי׃
verses.englishText: who hitherto waited in the king's gate eastward; they were the porters for the camp of the children of Levi.

jps.text: who hitherto waited in the king's gate eastward; they were the porters for the camp of the children of Levi.

verses.hebrewText: וְשַׁלּ֣וּם בֶּן־קֹ֠ורֵא בֶּן־אֶבְיָסָ֨ף בֶּן־קֹ֜רַח וְֽאֶחָ֧יו לְבֵית־אָבִ֣יו הַקָּרְחִ֗ים עַ֚ל מְלֶ֣אכֶת הָעֲבֹודָ֔ה שֹׁמְרֵ֥י הַסִּפִּ֖ים לָאֹ֑הֶל וַאֲבֹֽתֵיהֶם֙ עַל־מַחֲנֵ֣ה יְהוָ֔ה שֹׁמְרֵ֖י הַמָּבֹֽוא׃
verses.englishText: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of his father's house, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the Tent; and their fathers had been over the camp of the LORD, keepers of the entry;

jps.text: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of his father's house, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the gates of the Tent; and their fathers had been over the camp of the LORD, keepers of the entry;

verses.hebrewText: וּפִֽינְחָ֣ס בֶּן־אֶלְעָזָ֗ר נָגִ֨יד הָיָ֧ה עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם לְפָנִ֖ים יְהוָ֥ה ׀ עִמֹּֽו׃
verses.englishText: and Phinehas the son of Eleazar was ruler over them in time past, the LORD being with him.

jps.text: and Phinehas the son of Eleazar was ruler over them in time past, the LORD being with him.

verses.hebrewText: זְכַרְיָה֙ בֶּ֣ן מְשֶֽׁלֶמְיָ֔ה שֹׁעֵ֥ר פֶּ֖תַח לְאֹ֥הֶל מֹועֵֽד׃
verses.englishText: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was porter of the door of the tent of meeting.

jps.text: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was porter of the door of the tent of meeting.

verses.hebrewText: כֻּלָּ֤ם הַבְּרוּרִים֙ לְשֹׁעֲרִ֣ים בַּסִּפִּ֔ים מָאתַ֖יִם וּשְׁנֵ֣ים עָשָׂ֑ר הֵ֤מָּה בְחַצְרֵיהֶם֙ הִתְיַחְשָׂ֔ם הֵ֣מָּה יִסַּ֥ד דָּוִ֛יד וּשְׁמוּאֵ֥ל הָרֹאֶ֖ה בֶּאֱמוּנָתָֽם׃
verses.englishText: All these that were chosen to be porters in the gates were two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.

jps.text: All these that were chosen to be porters in the gates were two hundred and twelve. These were reckoned by genealogy in their villages, whom David and Samuel the seer did ordain in their set office.

verses.hebrewText: וְהֵ֨ם וּבְנֵיהֶ֜ם עַל־הַשְּׁעָרִ֧ים לְבֵית־יְהוָ֛ה לְבֵ֥ית־הָאֹ֖הֶל לְמִשְׁמָרֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the LORD, even the house of the Tent, by wards.

jps.text: So they and their children had the oversight of the gates of the house of the LORD, even the house of the Tent, by wards.

verses.hebrewText: לְאַרְבַּ֣ע רוּחֹ֔ות יִהְי֖וּ הַשֹּׁעֲרִ֑ים מִזְרָ֥ח יָ֖מָּה צָפֹ֥ונָה וָנֶֽגְבָּה׃
verses.englishText: On the four sides were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.

jps.text: On the four sides were the porters, toward the east, west, north, and south.

verses.hebrewText: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֨ם בְּחַצְרֵיהֶ֜ם לָבֹ֨וא לְשִׁבְעַ֧ת הַיָּמִ֛ים מֵעֵ֥ת אֶל־עֵ֖ת עִם־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.englishText: And their brethren, in their villages, were to come in every seven days from time to time to be with them;

jps.text: And their brethren, in their villages, were to come in every seven days from time to time to be with them;

verses.hebrewText: כִּ֣י בֶאֱמוּנָ֞ה הֵ֗מָּה אַרְבַּ֙עַת֙ גִּבֹּרֵ֣י הַשֹּׁעֲרִ֔ים הֵ֖ם הַלְוִיִּ֑ם וְהָיוּ֙ עַל־הַלְּשָׁכֹ֔ות וְעַ֥ל הָאֹצְרֹ֖ות בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.englishText: for the four chief porters were in a set office. These were the Levites. They were also over the chambers and over the treasuries in the house of God.

jps.text: for the four chief porters were in a set office. These were the Levites. They were also over the chambers and over the treasuries in the house of God.

verses.hebrewText: וּסְבִיבֹ֥ות בֵּית־הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים יָלִ֑ינוּ כִּֽי־עֲלֵיהֶ֣ם מִשְׁמֶ֔רֶת וְהֵ֥ם עַל־הַמַּפְתֵּ֖חַ וְלַבֹּ֥קֶר לַבֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.englishText: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge thereof was upon them, and to them pertained the opening thereof morning by morning.

jps.text: And they lodged round about the house of God, because the charge thereof was upon them, and to them pertained the opening thereof morning by morning.

verses.hebrewText: וּמֵהֶ֖ם עַל־כְּלֵ֣י הָעֲבֹודָ֑ה כִּֽי־בְמִסְפָּ֣ר יְבִיא֔וּם וּבְמִסְפָּ֖ר יֹוצִיאֽוּם׃
verses.englishText: And certain of them had charge of the vessels of service; for by tale were they brought in and by tale were they taken out.

jps.text: And certain of them had charge of the vessels of service; for by tale were they brought in and by tale were they taken out.

verses.hebrewText: וּמֵהֶ֗ם מְמֻנִּים֙ עַל־הַכֵּלִ֔ים וְעַ֖ל כָּל־כְּלֵ֣י הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ וְעַל־הַסֹּ֙לֶת֙ וְהַיַּ֣יִן וְהַשֶּׁ֔מֶן וְהַלְּבֹונָ֖ה וְהַבְּשָׂמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: Some of them also were appointed over the furniture, and over all the holy vessels, and over the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.

jps.text: Some of them also were appointed over the furniture, and over all the holy vessels, and over the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־בְּנֵי֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים רֹקְחֵ֥י הַמִּרְקַ֖חַת לַבְּשָׂמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And some of the sons of the priests prepared the confection of the spices.

jps.text: And some of the sons of the priests prepared the confection of the spices.

verses.hebrewText: וּמַתִּתְיָה֙ מִן־הַלְוִיִּ֔ם ה֥וּא הַבְּכֹ֖ור לְשַׁלֻּ֣ם הַקָּרְחִ֑י בֶּאֱמוּנָ֕ה עַ֖ל מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה הַחֲבִתִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were baked on griddles.

jps.text: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were baked on griddles.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִן־בְּנֵ֧י הַקְּהָתִ֛י מִן־אֲחֵיהֶ֖ם עַל־לֶ֣חֶם הַֽמַּעֲרָ֑כֶת לְהָכִ֖ין שַׁבַּ֥ת שַׁבָּֽת׃ ס
verses.englishText: And some of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the showbread, to prepare it every sabbath.

jps.text: And some of their brethren, of the sons of the Kohathites, were over the showbread, to prepare it every sabbath.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֣לֶּה הַ֠מְשֹׁרְרִים רָאשֵׁ֨י אָבֹ֧ות לַלְוִיִּ֛ם בַּלְּשָׁכֹ֖ת *פְּטִירִים (פְּטוּרִ֑ים) כִּֽי־יֹומָ֥ם וָלַ֛יְלָה עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם בַּמְּלָאכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And these are the singers, heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, who dwelt in the chambers and were free from other service; for they were employed in their work day and night.

jps.text: And these are the singers, heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, who dwelt in the chambers and were free from other service; for they were employed in their work day and night.

verses.hebrewText: אֵלֶּה֩ רָאשֵׁ֨י הָאָבֹ֧ות לַלְוִיִּ֛ם לְתֹלְדֹותָ֖ם רָאשִׁ֑ים אֵ֖לֶּה יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ פ
verses.englishText: These were heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, by their generations, chief men; these dwelt at Jerusalem.

jps.text: These were heads of fathers' houses of the Levites, by their generations, chief men; these dwelt at Jerusalem.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְגִבְעֹ֛ון יָשְׁב֥וּ אֲבִֽי־גִבְעֹ֖ון *יְעוּאֵל (יְעִיאֵ֑ל) וְשֵׁ֥ם אִשְׁתֹּ֖ו מַעֲכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, whose wife's name was Maacah;

jps.text: And in Gibeon there dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, whose wife's name was Maacah;

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֹ֥ו הַבְּכֹ֖ור עַבְדֹּ֑ון וְצ֣וּר וְקִ֔ישׁ וּבַ֥עַל וְנֵ֖ר וְנָדָֽב׃
verses.englishText: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab;

jps.text: and his first-born son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab;

verses.hebrewText: וּגְדֹ֣ור וְאַחְיֹ֔ו וּזְכַרְיָ֖ה וּמִקְלֹֽות׃
verses.englishText: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.

jps.text: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.

verses.hebrewText: וּמִקְלֹ֖ות הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שִׁמְאָ֑ם וְאַף־הֵ֗ם נֶ֧גֶד אֲחֵיהֶ֛ם יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירֽוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם עִם־אֲחֵיהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And Mikloth begot Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

jps.text: And Mikloth begot Shimeam. And they also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against their brethren.

verses.hebrewText: וְנֵר֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־קִ֔ישׁ וְקִ֖ישׁ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־שָׁא֑וּל וְשָׁא֗וּל הֹולִ֤יד אֶת־יְהֹֽונָתָן֙ וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁ֔וּעַ וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָ֖ב וְאֶת־אֶשְׁבָּֽעַל׃
verses.englishText: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

jps.text: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Eshbaal.

verses.hebrewText: וּבֶן־יְהֹונָתָ֖ן מְרִ֣יב בָּ֑עַל וּמְרִי־בַ֖עַל הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־מִיכָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.

jps.text: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-baal; and Merib-baal begot Micah.

verses.hebrewText: וּבְנֵ֖י מִיכָ֑ה פִּיתֹ֥ון וָמֶ֖לֶךְ וְתַחְרֵֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: And the sons of Micah: Pithon, and Melech, and Taharea, and Ahaz.

jps.text: And the sons of Micah: Pithon, and Melech, and Taharea, and Ahaz.

verses.hebrewText: וְאָחָז֙ הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־יַעְרָ֔ה וְיַעְרָ֗ה הֹולִ֛יד אֶת־עָלֶ֥מֶת וְאֶת־עַזְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־זִמְרִ֑י וְזִמְרִ֖י הֹולִ֥יד אֶת־מֹוצָֽא׃
verses.englishText: And Ahaz begot Jarah; and Jarah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza.

jps.text: And Ahaz begot Jarah; and Jarah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza.

verses.hebrewText: וּמֹוצָ֖א הֹולִ֣יד אֶת־בִּנְעָ֑א וּרְפָיָ֥ה בְנֹ֛ו אֶלְעָשָׂ֥ה בְנֹ֖ו אָצֵ֥ל בְּנֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And Moza begot Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

jps.text: And Moza begot Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

verses.hebrewText: וּלְאָצֵל֮ שִׁשָּׁ֣ה בָנִים֒ וְאֵ֣לֶּה שְׁמֹותָ֗ם עַזְרִיקָ֥ם ׀ בֹּ֙כְרוּ֙ וְיִשְׁמָעֵ֣אל וּשְׁעַרְיָ֔ה וְעֹבַדְיָ֖ה וְחָנָ֑ן אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י אָצַֽל׃ פ
verses.englishText: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.

jps.text: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these: Azrikam, Bocru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.

verses.hebrewText: וּפְלִשְׁתִּ֖ים נִלְחֲמ֣וּ בְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיָּ֑נָס אִֽישׁ־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מִפְּנֵ֣י פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים וַיִּפְּל֥וּ חֲלָלִ֖ים בְּהַ֥ר גִּלְבֹּֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.

jps.text: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain in mount Gilboa.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּדְבְּק֣וּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים אַחֲרֵ֥י שָׁא֖וּל וְאַחֲרֵ֣י בָנָ֑יו וַיַּכּ֣וּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים אֶת־יֹונָתָ֧ן וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָ֛ב וְאֶת־מַלְכִּי־שׁ֖וּעַ בְּנֵ֥י שָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.englishText: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.

jps.text: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul and after his sons; and the Philistines slew Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchi-shua, the sons of Saul.

verses.hebrewText: וַתִּכְבַּ֤ד הַמִּלְחָמָה֙ עַל־שָׁא֔וּל וַיִּמְצָאֻ֖הוּ הַמֹּורִ֣ים בַּקָּ֑שֶׁת וַיָּ֖חֶל מִן־הַיֹּורִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers overtook him; and he was in anguish by reason of the archers.

jps.text: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers overtook him; and he was in anguish by reason of the archers.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר שָׁאוּל֩ אֶל־נֹשֵׂ֨א כֵלָ֜יו שְׁלֹ֥ף חַרְבְּךָ֣ ׀ וְדָקְרֵ֣נִי בָ֗הּ פֶּן־יָבֹ֜אוּ הָעֲרֵלִ֤ים הָאֵ֙לֶּה֙ וְהִתְעַלְּלוּ־בִ֔י וְלֹ֤א אָבָה֙ נֹשֵׂ֣א כֵלָ֔יו כִּ֥י יָרֵ֖א מְאֹ֑ד ס וַיִּקַּ֤ח שָׁאוּל֙ אֶת־הַחֶ֔רֶב וַיִּפֹּ֖ל עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.englishText: Then said Saul unto his armour-bearer: 'Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and make a mock of me.' But his armour-bearer would not; for he was sore afraid. Therefore Saul took his sword, and fell upon it.

jps.text: Then said Saul unto his armour-bearer: 'Draw thy sword, and thrust me through therewith; lest these uncircumcised come and make a mock of me.' But his armour-bearer would not; for he was sore afraid. Therefore Saul took his sword, and fell upon it.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֥רְא נֹשֵֽׂא־כֵלָ֖יו כִּ֣י מֵ֣ת שָׁא֑וּל וַיִּפֹּ֥ל גַּם־ה֛וּא עַל־הַחֶ֖רֶב וַיָּמֹֽת׃ ס
verses.englishText: And when his armour-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he likewise fell upon his sword, and died.

jps.text: And when his armour-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he likewise fell upon his sword, and died.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֤מָת שָׁאוּל֙ וּשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת בָּנָ֔יו וְכָל־בֵּיתֹ֖ו יַחְדָּ֥ו מֵֽתוּ׃
verses.englishText: So Saul died, and his three sons; and all his house died together.

jps.text: So Saul died, and his three sons; and all his house died together.

verses.hebrewText: וַ֠יִּרְאוּ כָּל־אִ֨ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל אֲשֶׁר־בָּעֵ֙מֶק֙ כִּ֣י נָ֔סוּ וְכִי־מֵ֖תוּ שָׁא֣וּל וּבָנָ֑יו וַיַּעַזְב֤וּ עָרֵיהֶם֙ וַיָּנֻ֔סוּ וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים וַיֵּשְׁב֖וּ בָּהֶֽם׃ ס
verses.englishText: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that Israel fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, they forsook their cities, and fled; and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.

jps.text: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that Israel fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, they forsook their cities, and fled; and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.

verses.hebrewText: וַיְהִי֙ מִֽמָּחֳרָ֔ת וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים לְפַשֵּׁ֖ט אֶת־הֽ͏ַחֲלָלִ֑ים וַֽיִּמְצְא֤וּ אֶת־שָׁאוּל֙ וְאֶת־בָּנָ֔יו נֹפְלִ֖ים בְּהַ֥ר גִּלְבֹּֽעַ׃
verses.englishText: And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.

jps.text: And it came to pass on the morrow, when the Philistines came to strip the slain, that they found Saul and his sons fallen in mount Gilboa.

verses.hebrewText: וַיַּ֨פְשִׁיטֻ֔הוּ וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ אֶת־רֹאשֹׁ֖ו וְאֶת־כֵּלָ֑יו וַיְשַׁלְּח֨וּ בְאֶֽרֶץ־פְלִשְׁתִּ֜ים סָבִ֗יב לְבַשֵּׂ֛ר אֶת־עֲצַבֵּיהֶ֖ם וְאֶת־הָעָֽם׃
verses.englishText: And they stripped him, and took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry the tidings unto their idols, and to the people.

jps.text: And they stripped him, and took his head, and his armour, and sent into the land of the Philistines round about, to carry the tidings unto their idols, and to the people.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּשִׂ֙ימוּ֙ אֶת־כֵּלָ֔יו בֵּ֖ית אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֑ם וְאֶת־גֻּלְגָּלְתֹּ֥ו תָקְע֖וּ בֵּ֥ית דָּגֹֽון׃ ס
verses.englishText: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the house of Dagon.

jps.text: And they put his armour in the house of their gods, and fastened his head in the house of Dagon.

verses.hebrewText: וַֽיִּשְׁמְע֔וּ כֹּ֖ל יָבֵ֣ישׁ גִּלְעָ֑ד אֵ֛ת כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־עָשׂ֥וּ פְלִשְׁתִּ֖ים לְשָׁאֽוּל׃
verses.englishText: And when all Jabesh-gilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,

jps.text: And when all Jabesh-gilead heard all that the Philistines had done to Saul,

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּקוּמוּ֮ כָּל־אִ֣ישׁ חַיִל֒ וַיִּשְׂא֞וּ אֶת־גּוּפַ֣ת שָׁא֗וּל וְאֵת֙ גּוּפֹ֣ת בָּנָ֔יו וַיְבִיא֖וּם יָבֵ֑ישָׁה וַיִּקְבְּר֨וּ אֶת־עַצְמֹותֵיהֶ֜ם תַּ֤חַת הָאֵלָה֙ בְּיָבֵ֔שׁ וַיָּצ֖וּמוּ שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִֽים׃
verses.englishText: all the valiant men arose, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the terebinth in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

jps.text: all the valiant men arose, and took away the body of Saul, and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the terebinth in Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

verses.hebrewText: וַיָּ֣מָת שָׁא֗וּל בְּמַֽעֲלֹו֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר מָעַ֣ל בַּֽיהוָ֔ה עַל־דְּבַ֥ר יְהוָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־שָׁמָ֑ר וְגַם־לִשְׁאֹ֥ול בָּאֹ֖וב לִדְרֹֽושׁ׃
verses.englishText: So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the LORD, because of the word of the LORD, which he kept not; and also for that he asked counsel of a ghost, to inquire thereby,

jps.text: So Saul died for his transgression which he committed against the LORD, because of the word of the LORD, which he kept not; and also for that he asked counsel of a ghost, to inquire thereby,

verses.hebrewText: וְלֹֽא־דָרַ֥שׁ בַּֽיהוָ֖ה וַיְמִיתֵ֑הוּ וַיַּסֵּב֙ אֶת־הַמְּלוּכָ֔ה לְדָוִ֖יד בֶּן־יִשָֽׁי׃ פ
verses.englishText: and inquired not of the LORD; therefore He slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.

jps.text: and inquired not of the LORD; therefore He slew him, and turned the kingdom unto David the son of Jesse.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּקָּבְצ֧וּ כָֽל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל אֶל־דָּוִ֖יד חֶבְרֹ֣ונָה לֵאמֹ֑ר הִנֵּ֛ה עַצְמְךָ֥ וּֽבְשָׂרְךָ֖ אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.englishText: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying: 'Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.

jps.text: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying: 'Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.

verses.hebrewText: גַּם־תְּמֹ֣ול גַּם־שִׁלְשֹׁ֗ום גַּ֚ם בִּהְיֹ֣ות שָׁא֣וּל מֶ֔לֶךְ אַתָּ֛ה הַמֹּוצִ֥יא וְהַמֵּבִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיֹּאמֶר֩ יְהוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ לְךָ֗ אַתָּ֨ה תִרְעֶ֤ה אֶת־עַמִּי֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְאַתָּה֙ תִּהְיֶ֣ה נָגִ֔יד עַ֖ל עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.englishText: In times past, even when Saul was king, it was thou that didst lead out and bring in Israel; and the LORD thy God said unto thee: Thou shalt feed My people Israel, and thou shalt be prince over My people Israel.'

jps.text: In times past, even when Saul was king, it was thou that didst lead out and bring in Israel; and the LORD thy God said unto thee: Thou shalt feed My people Israel, and thou shalt be prince over My people Israel.'

verses.hebrewText: וַ֠יָּבֹאוּ כָּל־זִקְנֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל אֶל־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ חֶבְרֹ֔ונָה וַיִּכְרֹת֩ לָהֶ֨ם דָּוִ֥יד בְּרִ֛ית בְּחֶבְרֹ֖ון לִפְנֵ֣י יְהוָ֑ה וַיִּמְשְׁח֨וּ אֶת־דָּוִ֤יד לְמֶ֙לֶךְ֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּדְבַ֥ר יְהוָ֖ה בְּיַד־שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: So all the elders of Israel came to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the LORD; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by the hand of Samuel.

jps.text: So all the elders of Israel came to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the LORD; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by the hand of Samuel.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּ֨לֶךְ דָּוִ֧יד וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם הִ֣יא יְב֑וּס וְשָׁם֙ הַיְבוּסִ֔י יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.englishText: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem — the same is Jebus — and the Jebusites, the inhabitants of the land, were there.

jps.text: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem — the same is Jebus — and the Jebusites, the inhabitants of the land, were there.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֨אמְר֜וּ יֹשְׁבֵ֤י יְבוּס֙ לְדָוִ֔יד לֹ֥א תָבֹ֖וא הֵ֑נָּה וַיִּלְכֹּ֤ד דָּוִיד֙ אֶת־מְצֻדַ֣ת צִיֹּ֔ון הִ֖יא עִ֥יר דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David: 'Thou shalt not come in hither.' Nevertheless David took the stronghold of Zion; the same is the city of David.

jps.text: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David: 'Thou shalt not come in hither.' Nevertheless David took the stronghold of Zion; the same is the city of David.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֔יד כָּל־מַכֵּ֤ה יְבוּסִי֙ בָּרִ֣אשֹׁונָ֔ה יִהְיֶ֥ה לְרֹ֖אשׁ וּלְשָׂ֑ר וַיַּ֧עַל בָּרִאשֹׁונָ֛ה יֹואָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֖ה וַיְהִ֥י לְרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.englishText: And David said: 'Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain.' And Joab the son of Zeruiah went up first, and was made chief.

jps.text: And David said: 'Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain.' And Joab the son of Zeruiah went up first, and was made chief.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב דָּוִ֖יד בַּמְצָ֑ד עַל־כֵּ֥ן קָרְאוּ־לֹ֖ו עִ֥יר דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.englishText: And David dwelt in the stronghold; therefore they called it the city of David.

jps.text: And David dwelt in the stronghold; therefore they called it the city of David.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּ֤בֶן הָעִיר֙ מִסָּבִ֔יב מִן־הַמִּלֹּ֖וא וְעַד־הַסָּבִ֑יב וְיֹואָ֕ב יְחַיֶּ֖ה אֶת־שְׁאָ֥ר הָעִֽיר׃
verses.englishText: And he built the city round about, from Millo even round about; and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

jps.text: And he built the city round about, from Millo even round about; and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ דָּוִ֖יד הָלֹ֣וךְ וְגָדֹ֑ול וַיהוָ֥ה צְבָאֹ֖ות עִמֹּֽו׃ פ
verses.englishText: And David waxed greater and greater; for the LORD of hosts was with him.

jps.text: And David waxed greater and greater; for the LORD of hosts was with him.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֨לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֤י הַגִּבֹּורִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְדָוִ֔יד הַמִּתְחַזְּקִ֨ים עִמֹּ֧ו בְמַלְכוּתֹ֛ו עִם־כָּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְהַמְלִיכֹ֑ו כִּדְבַ֥ר יְהוָ֖ה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ ס
verses.englishText: Now these are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who held strongly with him in his kingdom, together with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.

jps.text: Now these are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who held strongly with him in his kingdom, together with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.

verses.hebrewText: וְאֵ֛לֶּה מִסְפַּ֥ר הַגִּבֹּרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְדָוִ֑יד יָשָׁבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־חַכְמֹונִ֗י רֹ֚אשׁ *הַשְּׁלֹושִׁים (הַשָּׁ֣לִישִׁ֔ים) הֽוּא־עֹורֵ֧ר אֶת־חֲנִיתֹ֛ו עַל־שְׁלֹשׁ־מֵאֹ֥ות חָלָ֖ל בְּפַ֥עַם אֶחָֽת׃
verses.englishText: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had: Jashobeam, the son of a Hachmonite, the chief of the captains; he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them at one time.

jps.text: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had: Jashobeam, the son of a Hachmonite, the chief of the captains; he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them at one time.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַחֲרָ֛יו אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בֶּן־דֹּודֹ֖ו הָאֲחֹוחִ֑י ה֖וּא בִּשְׁלֹושָׁ֥ה הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighty men.

jps.text: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighty men.

verses.hebrewText: הֽוּא־הָיָ֨ה עִם־דָּוִ֜יד בַּפַּ֣ס דַּמִּ֗ים וְהַפְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ נֶאֱסְפוּ־שָׁ֣ם לַמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וַתְּהִ֛י חֶלְקַ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה מְלֵאָ֣ה שְׂעֹורִ֑ים וְהָעָ֥ם נָ֖סוּ מִפְּנֵ֥י פְלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.englishText: He was with David at Pas-dammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a plot of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.

jps.text: He was with David at Pas-dammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a plot of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּֽתְיַצְּב֤וּ בְתֹוךְ־הַחֶלְקָה֙ וַיַּצִּיל֔וּהָ וַיַּכּ֖וּ אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַיֹּ֥ושַׁע יְהוָ֖ה תְּשׁוּעָ֥ה גְדֹולָֽה׃
verses.englishText: But they stood in the midst of the plot, and defended it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved them by a great victory.

jps.text: But they stood in the midst of the plot, and defended it, and slew the Philistines; and the LORD saved them by a great victory.

verses.hebrewText: וַיֵּרְד֡וּ שְֽׁלֹושָׁה֩ מִן־הַשְּׁלֹושִׁ֨ים רֹ֤אשׁ עַל־הַצֻּר֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֔יד אֶל־מְעָרַ֖ת עֲדֻלָּ֑ם וּמַחֲנֵ֣ה פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים חֹנָ֖ה בְּעֵ֥מֶק רְפָאִֽים׃
verses.englishText: And three of the thirty chiefs went down to the rock to David, unto the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines were encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

jps.text: And three of the thirty chiefs went down to the rock to David, unto the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines were encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

verses.hebrewText: וְדָוִ֖יד אָ֣ז בַּמְּצוּדָ֑ה וּנְצִ֣יב פְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים אָ֖ז בְּבֵ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃
verses.englishText: And David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Beth-lehem.

jps.text: And David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Beth-lehem.

verses.hebrewText: *וַיִּתְאָו (וַיִּתְאָ֥יו) דָּוִ֖יד וַיֹּאמַ֑ר מִ֚י יַשְׁקֵ֣נִי מַ֔יִם מִבֹּ֥ור בֵּֽית־לֶ֖חֶם אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.englishText: And David longed, and said: 'Oh that one would give me water to drink of the well of Beth-lehem, which is by the gate!'

jps.text: And David longed, and said: 'Oh that one would give me water to drink of the well of Beth-lehem, which is by the gate!'

verses.hebrewText: וַיִּבְקְע֨וּ הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֜ה בְּמַחֲנֵ֣ה פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים וַיִּֽשְׁאֲבוּ־מַ֙יִם֙ מִבֹּ֤ור בֵּֽית־לֶ֙חֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשַּׁ֔עַר וַיִּשְׂא֖וּ וַיָּבִ֣אוּ אֶל־דָּוִ֑יד וְלֹֽא־אָבָ֤ה דָוִיד֙ לִשְׁתֹּותָ֔ם וַיְנַסֵּ֥ךְ אֹתָ֖ם לַיהוָֽה׃
verses.englishText: And the three broke through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth-lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David; but David would not drink thereof, but poured it out unto the LORD,

jps.text: And the three broke through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth-lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David; but David would not drink thereof, but poured it out unto the LORD,

verses.hebrewText: וַיֹּ֡אמֶר חָלִילָה֩ לִּ֨י מֵאֱלֹהַ֜י מֵעֲשֹׂ֣ות זֹ֗את הֲדַ֣ם הָאֲנָשִׁים֩ הָאֵ֨לֶּה אֶשְׁתֶּ֤ה בְנַפְשֹׁותָם֙ כִּ֣י בְנַפְשֹׁותָ֣ם הֱבִיא֔וּם וְלֹ֥א אָבָ֖ה לִשְׁתֹּותָ֑ם אֵ֣לֶּה עָשׂ֔וּ שְׁלֹ֖שֶׁת הַגִּבֹּורִֽים׃
verses.englishText: and said: 'My God forbid it me, that I should do this; shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it.' Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.

jps.text: and said: 'My God forbid it me, that I should do this; shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it.' Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.

verses.hebrewText: וְאַבְשַׁ֣י אֲחִֽי־יֹואָ֗ב ה֚וּא הָיָה֙ רֹ֣אשׁ הַשְּׁלֹושָׁ֔ה וְהוּא֙ עֹורֵ֣ר אֶת־חֲנִיתֹ֔ו עַל־שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵאֹ֖ות חָלָ֑ל *וְלֹא־ (וְלֹו)־שֵׁ֖ם בַּשְּׁלֹושָֽׁה׃
verses.englishText: And Abishai, the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three; for he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them, and had a name among the three.

jps.text: And Abishai, the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three; for he lifted up his spear against three hundred and slew them, and had a name among the three.

verses.hebrewText: מִן־הַשְּׁלֹושָׁ֤ה בַשְּׁנַ֙יִם֙ נִכְבָּ֔ד וַיְהִ֥י לָהֶ֖ם לְשָׂ֑ר וְעַד־הַשְּׁלֹושָׁ֖ה לֹֽא־בָֽא׃ ס
verses.englishText: Of the three in the second rank he was the most honourable, and was made their captain; howbeit he attained not to the first three.

jps.text: Of the three in the second rank he was the most honourable, and was made their captain; howbeit he attained not to the first three.

verses.hebrewText: בְּנָיָ֨ה בֶן־יְהֹויָדָ֧ע בֶּן־אִֽישׁ־חַ֛יִל רַב־פְּעָלִ֖ים מִֽן־קַבְצְאֵ֑ל ה֣וּא הִכָּ֗ה אֵ֣ת שְׁנֵ֤י אֲרִיאֵל֙ מֹואָ֔ב וְ֠הוּא יָרַ֞ד וְהִכָּ֧ה אֶֽת־הָאֲרִ֛י בְּתֹ֥וךְ הַבֹּ֖ור בְּיֹ֥ום הַשָּֽׁלֶג׃
verses.englishText: Beniah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done mighty deeds, he smote the two altar-hearths of Moab; he went down also and slew a lion in the midst of a pit in time of snow.

jps.text: Beniah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done mighty deeds, he smote the two altar-hearths of Moab; he went down also and slew a lion in the midst of a pit in time of snow.

verses.hebrewText: וְהֽוּא־הִכָּה֩ אֶת־הָאִ֨ישׁ הַמִּצְרִ֜י אִ֥ישׁ מִדָּ֣ה ׀ חָמֵ֣שׁ בָּאַמָּ֗ה וּבְיַ֨ד הַמִּצְרִ֤י חֲנִית֙ כִּמְנֹ֣ור אֹרְגִ֔ים וַיֵּ֥רֶד אֵלָ֖יו בַּשָּׁ֑בֶט וַיִּגְזֹ֤ל אֶֽת־הַחֲנִית֙ מִיַּ֣ד הַמִּצְרִ֔י וַיַּהַרְגֵ֖הוּ בַּחֲנִיתֹֽו׃
verses.englishText: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian's hand was a spear like a weaver's beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian's hand, and slew him with his own spear.

jps.text: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian's hand was a spear like a weaver's beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian's hand, and slew him with his own spear.

verses.hebrewText: אֵ֣לֶּה עָשָׂ֔ה בְּנָיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־יְהֹויָדָ֑ע וְלֹו־שֵׁ֖ם בִּשְׁלֹושָׁ֥ה הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃
verses.englishText: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had a name among the three mighty men.

jps.text: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had a name among the three mighty men.

verses.hebrewText: מִן־הַשְּׁלֹושִׁ֗ים הִנֹּ֤ו נִכְבָּד֙ ה֔וּא וְאֶל־הַשְּׁלֹושָׁ֖ה לֹא־בָ֑א וַיְשִׂימֵ֥הוּ דָוִ֖יד עַל־מִשְׁמַעְתֹּֽו׃ ס
verses.englishText: Behold, he was more honourable than the thirty, but he attained not to the first three; and David set him over his guard.

jps.text: Behold, he was more honourable than the thirty, but he attained not to the first three; and David set him over his guard.

verses.hebrewText: וְגִבֹּורֵ֖י הַחֲיָלִ֑ים עֲשָׂה־אֵל֙ אֲחִ֣י יֹואָ֔ב אֶלְחָנָ֥ן בֶּן־דֹּודֹ֖ו מִבֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃ ס
verses.englishText: Also the mighty men of valour: Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth-lehem;

jps.text: Also the mighty men of valour: Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth-lehem;

verses.hebrewText: שַׁמֹּות֙ הַהֲרֹורִ֔י חֶ֖לֶץ הַפְּלֹונִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite;

jps.text: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite;

verses.hebrewText: עִירָ֤א בֶן־עִקֵּשׁ֙ הַתְּקֹועִ֔י אֲבִיעֶ֖זֶר הָעֲנְּתֹותִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Anathothite;

jps.text: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Anathothite;

verses.hebrewText: סִבְּכַי֙ הַחֻ֣שָׁתִ֔י עִילַ֖י הָאֲחֹוחִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite;

jps.text: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite;

verses.hebrewText: מַהְרַי֙ הַנְּטֹ֣פָתִ֔י חֵ֥לֶד בֶּֽן־בַּֽעֲנָ֖ה הַנְּטֹופָתִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Mahrai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite;

jps.text: Mahrai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite;

verses.hebrewText: אִיתַ֣י בֶּן־רִיבַ֗י מִגִּבְעַת֙ בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֔ן ס בְּנָיָ֖ה הַפִּרְעָתֹנִֽי׃
verses.englishText: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite;

jps.text: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite;

verses.hebrewText: חוּרַי֙ מִנַּ֣חֲלֵי גָ֔עַשׁ ס אֲבִיאֵ֖ל הָעַרְבָתִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Hurai of Nahale-gaash, Abiel the Arbathite;

jps.text: Hurai of Nahale-gaash, Abiel the Arbathite;

verses.hebrewText: עַזְמָ֙וֶת֙ הַבַּ֣חֲרוּמִ֔י אֶלְיַחְבָּ֖א הַשַּׁעַלְבֹנִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite;

jps.text: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite;

verses.hebrewText: בְּנֵ֗י הָשֵׁם֙ הַגִּ֣זֹונִ֔י יֹונָתָ֥ן בֶּן־שָׁגֵ֖ה הַהֲרָרִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: the sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shageh the Hararite;

jps.text: the sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shageh the Hararite;

verses.hebrewText: אֲחִיאָ֧ם בֶּן־שָׂכָ֛ר הַהֲרָרִ֖י אֱלִיפַ֥ל בֶּן־אֽוּר׃ ס
verses.englishText: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur;

jps.text: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur;

verses.hebrewText: חֵ֚פֶר הַמְּכֵ֣רָתִ֔י אֲחִיָּ֖ה הַפְּלֹנִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite;

jps.text: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite;

verses.hebrewText: חֶצְרֹו֙ הַֽכַּרְמְלִ֔י נַעֲרַ֖י בֶּן־אֶזְבָּֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai;

jps.text: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai;

verses.hebrewText: יֹואֵל֙ אֲחִ֣י נָתָ֔ן מִבְחָ֖ר בֶּן־הַגְרִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri;

jps.text: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri;

verses.hebrewText: צֶ֖לֶק הָעַמֹּונִ֑י נַחְרַי֙ הַבֵּ֣רֹתִ֔י נֹשֵׂ֕א כְּלֵ֖י יֹואָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָֽה׃ ס
verses.englishText: Zelek the Ammonite, Nahrai the Berothite, the armour-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah;

jps.text: Zelek the Ammonite, Nahrai the Berothite, the armour-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah;

verses.hebrewText: עִירָא֙ הַיִּתְרִ֔י גָּרֵ֖ב הַיִּתְרִֽי׃ ס
verses.englishText: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite;

jps.text: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite;
